title: Senior IBM FileNet & BAW Developer (Java API/OAuth2)
description_text:
Job Type: Full-Time
Experience Level: 5–7 Years
________________________________________
Job Summary:
We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior Developer with a strong background in IBM FileNet, Business Automation Workflow (BAW), and Case Manager solutions. The ideal candidate will have a deep understanding of document management systems, document security, and the ability to integrate these solutions using Java APIs into custom web applications using modern frameworks like React and Angular, with secure protocols such as OAuth2 and JWT.
Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and consume Java-based APIs to interact with FileNet, BAW, and Case Manager platforms secured by OAuth2/JWT.
• Integrate backend APIs with frontend frameworks such (React/Angular), ensuring secure communication using OAuth2/JWT or standard authentication methods.
• Design, develop, and maintain IBM FileNet and IBM BAW workflows and processes.
• Build and customize Case Manager solutions, integrating with FileNet repositories and external systems.
• Implement efficient and secure document handling and storage solutions, including access control and encryption strategies.
• Collaborate with solution architects and business analysts to deliver scalable enterprise solutions.
Must-Have Qualifications:
• 5–7 years of hands-on experience in developing and configuring:
o IBM FileNet CPE
o IBM Business Automation Workflow (BAW)
o IBM Case Manager
• Proven ability to use Java APIs to interact with IBM FileNet and BAW for accessing and managing documents, workflows, and case data.
• Experience in authorizing/securing IBM APIs using OAuth2/JWT protocols.
• Experience in utilizing IBM APIs with modern UI frameworks such as React and Angular via secure REST APIs.
• Deep understanding of document management concepts, including versioning, metadata, and role-based access.
Preferred (Nice-to-Have) Skills:
• Experience with IBM ODM (Operational Decision Manager) including developing ODM solutions, deployment, and integration via REST/SOAP APIs.
• Familiarity with ODM security models and how to manage access to ODM engine securely. 
• Experience in administration, installation, and upgrade of IBM FileNet and BAW components either on traditional setups (e.g. VMWare) or on containers such Kubernetes or OpenShift.
Education:
• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field.
Soft Skills:
• Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
• Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment.
• Strong communication skills, both verbal and written.
• Ability to prioritize tasks and work with minimal supervision.
Language required: Arabic + English
Contract lengths 12 months
Offshore from Egypt remotely to Dubai
Core hours - 9-6pm dubai time
Budgets – to be discussed, please share the salary expectations/rates
Please consider all profiles to follow the below language requirements:
Language requirement:
Arabic speaking
English proficiency C1 and C2 levels, minimum B2
start date 1 March 2026 (1 year)
Job Special Requirements
Expected working hours (please note this role may require overtime)
Official days off
Gender preference (if any) for this role
Preferred notice period for the selected candidate
Contract type and expected duration (e.g., permanent, temporary, or project-based)
Overview of the interview process
Interview format (on-site or online)
Benefits offered, such as medical insurance, transportation, bonuses, etc.
Travel requirements, whether local or international (if applicable)
Work location and model (on-site, hybrid, or remote)
Any hiring restrictions (e.g., from specific employers or competitors)
Residential location restrictions (if any apply to candidates)
Preferred nationality (if the position is not local)
· May we share your company’s name with candidates during the screening process? (Yes / No)

Key tasks include designing, developing, and maintaining workflows and customizing Case Manager solutions while implementing secure document handling.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess 5–7 years of hands-on experience developing and configuring IBM FileNet CPE, BAW, and Case Manager, with proven ability to use Java APIs for data management secured by OAuth2/JWT. Experience integrating these systems with modern UI frameworks like React/Angular via secure REST APIs is essential.

title: Revel CPA - Operations Lead
description_text:
Ready to lead operations and drive real impact? Apply now!
$2,500–$3,000/month | Full-time | Fully Remote
Click here to watch the video from the Founder of Revel CPA.

At Revel CPA, we provide accounting and tax services built for modern businesses. We help our clients stay compliant, make informed financial decisions, and grow with confidence. Our team works fully remotely, and we've built a culture that values clarity, collaboration, and continuous improvement. We believe in using technology to work smarter, empowering our team to do meaningful work, and creating an environment where people feel trusted and supported.
We're looking for an Operations Lead who will serve as a trusted right hand to our President and COO. This isn't an administrative role it's about owning operational workflows end to end, driving initiatives forward with minimal oversight, and helping us scale through strong systems and execution. You'll be the person who ensures nothing falls through the cracks, who spots inefficiencies before they become problems, and who brings process-minded thinking to everything you touch.
📋 Own and manage core operational workflows, including client communications, onboarding, and tax-related coordination 
📋Handle all invoicing
✅ Ensure work is tracked, completed accurately, and fully closed out across all touchpoints 
🔍 Identify gaps or inefficiencies in processes and drive improvements using systems thinking, AI, and automation 
🚀 Lead client onboarding operations to ensure a smooth, consistent experience 
🤝 Facilitate cross-departmental coordination and surface risks or blockers early 
💰 Support contractor payroll processes with accuracy and timeliness 
🎉 Drive team engagement initiatives, including virtual team lunches and creative approaches to employee satisfaction 
⚡ Execute internal initiatives on behalf of leadership, ensuring momentum and follow-through 
Working Hours: This is a full-time, fully remote role with a significant overlap with US times (EST)
Must-haves:
✅ 4-5 years of experience in a similar operations or workflow management role 
✅ Experienced with invoicing
✅ Experienced with operations and workflow/project management 
✅ Highly detail-oriented, organized, and reliable 
✅ 3+ years of working in a fully remote environment 
✅ Proven ability to own work end to end and manage multiple priorities 
✅ Comfortable working across teams and following up as needed 
✅ Proficient in Google Workspace and macOS 
✅ Discreet and trustworthy with sensitive information 
✅ Demonstrated ability to work independently while also being a strong, collaborative team player 
Brownie points:
⭐ Experience supporting leadership or acting as an operations right-hand 
⭐ Familiarity with accounting, tax, or professional services environments 
⭐ Passion for AI, automation, and improving systems through technology 
⭐ Experience documenting and improving internal processes 
⭐ Prior experience helping drive team culture or engagement initiatives 
You're proactive, self-directed, and ownership oriented. You have excellent follow-through and a process-minded approach to your work. You're calm under pressure, dependable, and highly accountable. You're comfortable making thoughtful judgment calls without constant direction, and you communicate clearly and respectfully across teams. You're curious and improvement-focused, especially when it comes to systems and efficiency. Above all, you're trustworthy and professional when handling sensitive information.
What’s in it for you?
💵 $2,500–$3,000/month*
🌍 Full-time, fully remote role—work from anywhere 
🏖️ Unlimited PTO and all US Federal Holidays 
❄️ Additional week off during the December winter holidays 
📚 Professional development stipend 
💻 macOS laptop provided 
🤝 Supportive, collaborative team culture
*Please note that this is a gross salary and that you are responsible for any tax-related procedures in your country of residence. We kindly ask you to apply only if you are happy to work remotely as an independent contractor.
This is our typical hiring process - occasionally, it may include extra steps.
For this role, JobRack is partnering with CROSBY to find their next hire. We’ll handle all the screening and testing, so they see only the best-fit candidates - like you!
🔍 How to shine
• Read the role details carefully.
• Submit a thoughtful, high-quality application.
• Stay responsive - we’ll keep you updated at every stage.
✨ Important notes
• Apply only through JobRack; please don’t contact the company directly.
• We expect a respectful hiring experience - any disrespect means instant disqualification.
• This is a full-time, primary role (no freelancing or second jobs).
❓ New to remote work?
Check out our handy FAQ: jobrack.eu/jobseeker-faq

This role involves identifying process inefficiencies and driving improvements using systems thinking, AI, and automation, alongside leading client onboarding operations.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have 4-5 years of experience in operations or workflow management, including proficiency with invoicing and project management, with at least 3 years working in a fully remote setting. Essential qualities include being highly detail-oriented, reliable, trustworthy with sensitive data, and capable of owning work end-to-end with minimal oversight.

title: Atlantbh Internship
locations_alt_raw: Sarajevo, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina, Bosnia and Herzegovina
locations_derived: City of Sarajevo, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina, Bosnia and Herzegovina
description_text:
This cycle of the Atlantbh Internship will be organized remotely (with an opportunity for some in-office visits). 
Internship programs
Software Development (3 interns)
Interns will develop a full-stack application using cutting edge technologies and learn how to implement best coding practices. RESTful web services will be developed using back-end technologies based on Java programming language and frameworks, such as Spring Boot.
The application’s front-end will be developed using React or Angular. Interns will have the opportunity to familiarize themselves with other interesting concepts during different stages of software development including Git, Jenkins, Maven, AWS, JUnit, Design patterns, MVC and CI. Additionally, the project will include working with relational databases, such as PostgreSQL, as well as communication with external APIs. Finally, interns will have the opportunity to learn from experienced Software Engineers through workshop presentations and one-on-one mentorship.
Quality Assurance (2 interns)
Interns will have the opportunity to learn how to validate a web application, becoming familiar with all the necessary techniques, technologies and principles used for quality assurance of a system. They will work on designing and creating test plans, creating and executing test cases and learn about testing methodologies, as well as when to execute different kinds of tests (Smoke, Regression, API, etc.), in order to assure product quality. 
The interns will collaborate with the development team, gaining hands on experience with scrum and the Agile methodology, and learn about the importance of teamwork. Additionally, for this internship cycle, we have organized 2 separate QA programs, distinguished by the applied programming/scripting languages used for automation development.
JS (1 Intern) - Programming/scripting languages include JavaScript, Playwright, Axios, Git, Postman, Jenkins, etc.
Python (1 Intern) - Programming/scripting languages include Python, Playwright, Pytest, Git, Postman, Jenkins, etc.
DevOps (1 intern)
The intern will have the opportunity to expand their knowledge of Linux filesystem and Bash scripting. While adopting DevOps practices, they will learn about CI/CD, containerization and orchestration, infrastructure management, monitoring and networking. During the internship, the intern will collaborate with other interns in a real life scenario. This will include packaging software in Docker images, deploying Docker containers server-side and on Kubernetes, and integration of Frontend and Backend apps with a database. The intern will also learn how to write CI/CD pipelines, automate, build and deploy, manage Kubernetes infrastructure, and basic information security principles. 
By the end of the internship, the intern will be acquainted with the tools necessary for setting up and managing infrastructure, Continuous Integration and automated deployment processes (i.e. bash scripting, Docker, Kubernetes, Nginx, Jenkins, etc.), as well as troubleshooting network issues and basic InfoSec principles.
UX/UI Design (1 intern)
UX/UI design is a field that focuses on creating user-centered designs for web applications. The intern will learn how to create user experiences and interfaces that are intuitive, easy to use and visually pleasing. This will involve using design processes and methodologies that are commonly used in the industry, such as user research, wireframing, prototyping, and user testing. The intern will also have the opportunity to learn how to use design software such as Figma, which is a popular tool for creating and sharing design mockups. Additionally, the intern will be able to experience how design and development teams work together, and how design decisions are integrated into the development process. 
Please note, your application for the UX/UI Design internship program must include a portfolio/samples of your work. 
Product Management (1 intern)
The intern will have the chance to gain practical experience in product management by working on tasks that simulate real-world scenarios, such as defining product requirements, communicating with stakeholders and the different roles in the development team, and using Agile methodologies and tools such as Trello and Jira. By the end of the internship, the intern will have a solid understanding of Agile practices and be able to apply them in their future career. 
Like the other internship projects, the PM program is created for internship purposes only. Nevertheless, it is designed to provide a realistic and valuable learning experience and is modeled after actual challenges and tasks encountered in the field.
Machine Learning - NLP (1 intern)
This internship offers a comprehensive introduction to the world of Machine Learning (ML). The goal is to understand and work through the entire ML lifecycle, from processing and manipulating data all the way to model deployment.
During the foundational first month, the focus is on becoming familiar with the tools and practices necessary to create and fine-tune models. Throughout the internship, participants will gain experience with widely adopted open-source tools and ML frameworks, setting the stage for future learning and development.
For this internship cycle, the emphasis is on the solution interpretability of Natural Language Processing (NLP). The NLP programme will cover key concepts such as tokenization and transformer architectures, and the intern will fine-tune pre-trained models for a variety of tasks, including sentiment analysis, summarization, and named entity recognition.
The Atlantbh Internship assumes familiarity with the principles of object oriented programming, as well as knowledge of relational and non-relational databases. Candidates must be unemployed and hold BH citizenship. Beyond these requirements, however, there are no specific criteria for candidate selection, as Atlantbh considers various factors in the selection process. Although the internship is not intended as a programming school, we expect that some interns will be experiencing certain technologies for the first time.
Candidates applying for the DevOps internship program should have basic knowledge and experience with Linux based OS, networking, and some scripting language (Bash, Python etc). Any knowledge related to Development, QA and Operations is a plus. 
For the UX/UI Design internship program, the candidate's application must include a portfolio (send it to us together with your resume, or via email at talent@atlantbh.com).
Please note, only unemployed applicants that hold BH citizenship will be taken into consideration.
Mentorship - Each intern will be paired with a mentor who will provide guidance to ensure the successful completion of the allocated program.
Feedback - Interns will have the opportunity to present their work on a monthly basis to receive feedback on various aspects of their work.
Presentations - Experienced Atlantbh engineers will hold presentations for the interns. Topics will cover cutting edge technologies and best practices, as well as their tips and tricks for research, learning and problem solving. 
Collaboration - Depending on the internship program of choice, interns will have the opportunity to collaborate with other interns. 
Deadline for submitting the application is Sunday, 15.02.2026. at 23.59 (midnight).
Please note: when applying for the Atlantbh Internship, make sure you check your inbox daily - especially your junk/spam/promotions folders!

title: Webmethods (Senior Integration Developer Analyst)
description_text:
JOB DESCRIPTION
Senior Integration Developer/Analyst (IBM webMethods, Azure …)
We are seeking a highly experienced Senior Integration Developer and Analyst to handle the discovery, design, development, and migration of integration solutions. 
This role requires proficiency in IBM webMethods integration stack, coupled with strong analytical skills and documenting existing/new integrations.
Responsibilities
• Integration Analysis & Requirements Gathering:
o Support in Reverse-Engineering: With help of technical team, analyse and document the logic, data flow, security, and protocols of existing custom integration solutions, specifically.
o Requirements Collection: Collaborate with Business Analysts to collect, validate, and finalize the TO-BE Integration requirements for integrations.
o Technical Documentation: Create comprehensive technical design documents, integration mapping specifications, and detailed architecture diagrams for the new Integration platform.
• Integration Platform Development:
o Subject matter expert and developer using IBM webMethods integration platform (Integration Server, API Gateway, Universal Messaging , B2B ...etc)
o Preferred: Experience using Azure integration platform (e.g., Azure Logic Apps, Azure Functions, Azure API Management, Azure Service Bus, Event Grid).
o Design and implement scalable, secure, and performant integration solutions, ensuring adherence to enterprise governance and best practices.
o Handle migration of the existing G2G functionalities from the existing custom applications to the new Integration platform.
Required Skills and Experience
• 5 to 7 years of experience in enterprise application integration and software development.
• Hands-on expertise in IBM webMethods (required), Azure and other integration platforms (Preferred)
• Ability to analyse, read, and understand existing application logic.
• Practical experience integrating systems with government entities or similar public sector environments is highly desirable.
• Expert knowledge of RESTful APIs, SOAP, and securing web services (e.g., OAuth, JWT).
• Ability to bridge the gap between technical code analysis and business requirements documentation.
Engagement Details
• Role Type: Senior Integration Developer/Analyst
• Engagement: Full Time
• Location: Remote from Egypt to Dubai
Language required: Arabic + English
Contract lengths 12 months
Offshore from Egypt remotely to Dubai
Core hours - 9-6pm dubai time
Budgets – to be discussed, please share the salary expectations/rates
Please consider all profiles to follow the below language requirements:
Language requirement:
Arabic speaking
English proficiency C1 and C2 levels, minimum B2

Strong analytical skills are needed to bridge technical analysis and business documentation, and experience with Azure integration platforms is preferred.

title: DevOps Engineer
description_text:
Every day, somewhere in the world, important decisions are made. Whether it is a private equity company deciding to invest millions into a business or a large corporation implementing a new strategic direction, these decisions impact employees, customers, and other stakeholders. 
Consulting and private equity firms come to proSapient when they need to discover knowledge to help them make great decisions and succeed in their goals. It is our mission to support them in their discovery of knowledge. 
We help our clients find industry experts who can provide their knowledge via interview or survey: we curate this knowledge in a market-leading software platform; and we help clients surface knowledge they already have through expansive knowledge management. 
We’re hiring a DevOps Engineer to join proSapient as we scale a global primary research platform used by leading investors and consultants worldwide. 
This is a hands-on role for someone who enjoys working close to production systems - refactoring infrastructure, upgrading components, and improving reliability as the platform grows. You’ll work across AWS and Kubernetes, partnering closely with engineers to improve CI/CD pipelines, strengthen environments, and make deployments safer and smoother. 
You’ll join a collaborative engineering culture where DevOps plays a key role in enabling teams, not just responding to issues. While the platform is already live and operating at scale, there’s real opportunity to improve stability, reduce friction, and help shape how infrastructure is managed going forward. 
If you’ve worked in small DevOps teams or independently, are comfortable owning production changes, and care about communicating clearly when systems evolve, this role offers meaningful impact, variety, and the chance to grow alongside a scaling product and engineering organisation. 
Key duties in this role will include: 
Design, implement, and maintain cloud infrastructure using Terraform, ensuring systems are reliable, scalable, and secure 
Operate and optimize workloads on AWS, improving efficiency and performance across production environments 
Build, maintain, and enhance CI/CD pipelines using GitLab to streamline deployments and accelerate delivery 
Manage, scale, and secure Kubernetes clusters, enabling stable and resilient application operations 
Enhance observability, monitoring, and alerting using DataDog to proactively detect and resolve issues 
Support production releases, incident response, and root cause analysis, ensuring minimal downtime and rapid recovery 
Collaborate closely with engineering teams to improve system reliability, performance, and deployment workflows 
Hands-on experience with AWS in production environments 
Strong experience with Infrastructure as Code, ideally Terraform 
Experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines, preferably with GitLab 
Solid understanding of Kubernetes concepts and operations 
Good knowledge of monitoring, logging, and alerting practices 
Strong troubleshooting skills across infrastructure and application layers 
Why Join proSapient? 
Be part of a rapidly growing company that is redefining primary research 
Work on a modern cloud-native platform with real-world impact 
Collaborate with a talented, driven, and diverse engineering team 
Competitive salary and opportunities for professional development 
Tenure Gifts - Vouchers, extra holiday and sabbaticals for each year of employment. 
Health insurance through Vitality 
Employee Assistance Programme - Access to a health and wellbeing service that offers personalised advice and support from specialist teams. 
Enhanced Maternity & Paternity pay. 
Annual Leave - 25 days + bank holidays which includes a week's closure over the Christmas period to fully reset. 
MyMindPal app - Online support for mental fitness that helps people to stress less and enjoy life more 
Corporate Events - From quarterly gatherings to our annual winter & Summer parties, we love to celebrate, collaborate and have fun together! 
We are committed to building an inclusive workplace – did you know that marginalized groups are less likely to apply to jobs unless they meet every requirement listed? If you are interested in the above role, but don’t necessarily tick every box, we encourage you to apply anyway – this role could still be a great match! Take a look at our diversity statement here.
ai_benefits: Tenure Gifts - Vouchers, extra holiday and sabbaticals for each year of employment
Annual Leave - 25 days + bank holidays which includes a week's closure over the Christmas period
ai_core_responsibilities: Key duties involve designing, implementing, and maintaining reliable, scalable, and secure cloud infrastructure using Terraform on AWS, alongside operating and optimizing workloads on AWS. The role also requires building and enhancing CI/CD pipelines using GitLab and managing/scaling Kubernetes clusters.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have hands-on experience with AWS in production environments, strong experience with Infrastructure as Code (ideally Terraform), and experience building CI/CD pipelines, preferably with GitLab. A solid understanding of Kubernetes concepts and good knowledge of monitoring, logging, and alerting practices are also essential.

linkedin_org_description:
proSapient is a cutting-edge expert network and primary research platform that enables professionals to share insights with clients through short calls, online surveys and long-term engagements. 

Our clients include many of the world’s largest and most respected consultancy and private equity firms, and we have been featured in the Financial Times and in Sifted as one of the 100 fastest-growing businesses in Europe and the UK. 

Since our launch in 2017, we have revolutionized expert networking by offering new capabilities including the industry’s first AI-powered platform, enabling smarter, faster decision-making. Headquartered in the UK, proSapient is ISO 27001 accredited and employs over 300 people across four global locations: London, Lisbon, Raleigh, and Toronto.

Should an opportunity arise where we think your experience could be relevant for an expert call, one of our Client Services Associates will contact you and help to determine whether there is a suitable fit, agree a rate to compensate you for your time and then submit your profile to our client. Our client then decides whether to work with a given expert and should they wish to move forward, our Associate will assist in scheduling a call at a suitable time. 

We are continuously reimagining the expert networking landscape and remain at the forefront of technological innovation, committed to building the future of knowledge discovery. In recognition of our technological leadership, we've been recognized as a Future Fifty company by Tech Nation.

title: Cook B'/C'
description_text:
Grecotel Hotels & Resorts, the leading hotel chain in Greece, is seeking a Cook B’/C’ to join its team. As a Cook B’/C’, you will play an integral role in ensuring that our guests' culinary experiences exceed their expectations. You will work alongside our talented chefs, using your exceptional culinary skills to create memorable dishes that showcase the finest local and international flavors. title: Inventory Planner
description_text:
1. Position Overview
The Inventory Planner works under the Deployment team and is responsible for ensuring inventory readiness to support confirmed sales orders and deployment schedules.
This role plans inventory based on signed quotations and actual project timelines, rather than long-term or speculative demand forecasts. The Inventory Planner ensures materials are available at the right time to support deployments while avoiding unnecessary overstock or urgent purchasing.
The role balances operational readiness with cash flow and working capital considerations, understanding the financial impact of buying too early, holding excess inventory, or delaying purchases.
The Inventory Planner works closely with Sales, Deployment, and Finance teams, using structured data, system reports, analysis, and regular reporting to support accurate and timely purchasing and inventory decisions.
2. Key Responsibilities
A. Inventory Planning & Pipeline Alignment
Review and monitor the sales and deployment pipeline to anticipate upcoming inventory requirements.
Translate confirmed sales orders, signed quotations, and deployment schedules into clear inventory and purchasing plans.
Align purchase timing with actual project execution to ensure materials are available when needed, while avoiding premature buying.
Assess and communicate the cash flow and working capital impact of early purchasing, delayed purchasing, or excess inventory.
Track actual material consumption versus planned usage and highlight risks or gaps early to relevant stakeholders.
B. Inventory Control & Optimization
Maintain accurate inventory records and clear stock visibility across inventory and in-house systems.
Define, monitor, and manage reorder points, minimum stock levels, and buffer stock where required.
Monitor key inventory metrics including inventory turnover, stock aging, slow-moving items, and excess stock.
Recommend practical actions to reduce dead stock, overstock, and unnecessary inventory holding costs.
C. Data Analysis, Reporting & Insights
Build and maintain inventory tracking tools, dashboards, and reports using company systems and data sources.
Analyse inventory movements, consumption trends, and deployment-related usage.
Prepare regular inventory reports, including:
Stock availability and stock level summaries
Inventory consumption by project
Inventory accuracy and variance analysis
Slow-moving, aging, and excess inventory reports
At-risk and out-of-stock items
Inventory commitments and cash flow impact
Present clear insights, risks, and recommendations to Deployment, Sales, and Finance teams to support decision-making.
D. Warehouse & Logistics Coordination
Coordinate inbound and outbound stock movements in line with confirmed deployment and installation schedules.
Ensure inventory is physically available, correctly prepared, and deployment-ready at the required time and location.
Support cycle counts and physical stock checks to ensure alignment between system records and actual stock.
Monitor stock movement accuracy and identify, investigate, and flag discrepancies promptly.
Work closely with the Deployment team to ensure materials are released on time to support installation activities.
E. Cross-Functional Alignment
Work closely with the Sales team to understand confirmed deals, signed quotations, and pipeline timing.
Coordinate with Finance to align inventory plans with budgets, cash flow targets, and working capital constraints.
Support informed decisions on purchase timing, inventory exposure, and risk through clear, data-backed analysis.
3 + years of experience in inventory planning, supply chain, warehousing, or related operational roles.
Strong data analysis and reporting skills, with the ability to turn data into clear, actionable insights.
Comfortable working with inventory systems, ERP platforms, spreadsheets (e.g. Excel), or internal tools.
High attention to detail, with strong ownership of inventory accuracy and data quality.
Ability to balance operational requirements with cash flow and financial impact when making inventory decisions.
Strong communication skills in both Thai and English, spoken and written and a collaborative mindset.
Private Health Insurance
Pension Plan
Paid Time Off
Work From Home
Training & Development
Performance Bonus
ai_core_responsibilities: The Inventory Planner ensures inventory readiness by planning materials based on confirmed sales orders and project timelines, balancing operational needs with cash flow considerations. Key duties involve aligning purchasing with deployment schedules, maintaining accurate stock visibility, and optimizing inventory levels to reduce holding costs.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have over 3 years of experience in inventory planning or related supply chain roles, possessing strong data analysis and reporting skills to translate system data into actionable insights. Essential requirements include comfort with inventory systems/ERP, high attention to detail, and strong communication skills in both Thai and English.

title: Logistics Manager - Haïti
description_text:
Handicap International / Humanity & Inclusion (HI) est une association de solidarité internationale indépendante et impartiale, qui intervient dans les situations de pauvreté et d’exclusion, de conflits et de catastrophes. Œuvrant aux côtés des personnes handicapées et vulnérabilisées, elle agit et témoigne pour répondre à leurs besoins essentiels et améliorer leurs conditions de vie. Elle s’engage à promouvoir le respect de leur dignité et de leurs droits fondamentaux. 
Depuis sa création en 1982, HI a mis en place des programmes de développement dans plus de 55 pays et intervient dans de nombreuses situations d’urgence. Aujourd'hui, nous avons un budget d'environ 200 millions d'euros, avec 4000 employés dans le monde.
Chez Handicap International, nous croyons fermement en l'importance de l'inclusion et de la diversité au sein de notre structure. C'est pourquoi nous sommes engagés dans une politique handicap afin de favoriser l'accueil et l'intégration de personnes en situation de handicap.
Merci d’indiquer si vous avez besoin d’un aménagement particulier, y compris pour participer aux 1ers entretiens. Retrouvez plus d’informations sur l’association : www.hi.org.
CONTEXTE : 
Présente en Haïti depuis 2008, l’organisation met en œuvre des projets sur les thématiques suivantes :
- La réadaptation fonctionnelle 
- La défense des droits des personnes handicapées et l’inclusion
- Les réponses d’urgence (Cholera, déplacés internes, Cyclones, Séismes, etc.).
Les projets sont mis en œuvre avec de nombreux partenaires locaux dont des organisations de personnes handicapées, dans les départements de l’Ouest, du bas Nord-Ouest, du Nord, du Nord-Est, du Sud et du Sud-Est. Deux bases opérationnelles sont situées à Port-au-Prince et aux Cayes (ouverture de la base dans le cadre de la réponse au séisme d’aout 2021).
HI Haïti avait un budget global de 4.4 millions d’euros en 2024. L’équipe est composée de 58 membres du personnel (7 internationaux et 49 nationaux). Le programme est financé par la Coopération Belge au développement (DGD), Affaires Mondiales Canada, le ministère des Affaires étrangères du Luxembourg, ECHO, UNICEF, entre autres.
VOTRE MISSION :
Sous la responsabilité du directeur pays et en collaboration avec les services du siège, vous, en tant que Logistics Manager, assurez la gestion efficiente des ressources logistiques pour le programme dont vous êtes responsable. 
Vous êtes la personne de contact du directeur pays et, à ce titre, l'informez de tout problème et lui proposez des solutions dans son domaine de responsabilité. 
Vous êtes un acteur clé dans le déploiement et la mise en œuvre des standards logistiques de HI, consistant en un remaniement du positionnement de la logistique chez HI et l'affirmation du principe de la filière métier.
Vous aurez notamment comme responsabilités :
1 - Le management 
2 - La définition de la partie Logistique de la stratégie du programme et le pilotage du plan d’action afférent 
3 - Le déploiement des standards, la contribution à l’expertise et à la redevabilité de HI
4 - La mise en œuvre opérationnelle Logistique 
5 - L’animation de la filière métier logistique sur son programme et la contribution à l’évolution de la filière métier logistique de l’organisation 
6 - La préparation et réponses aux urgences 
SPECIFICITES/PARTICULARITES DU POSTE : 
La situation sécuritaire étant volatile, des restrictions existent concernant les déplacements, la marche, la conduite, qui peuvent être révisées en fonction des événements. Malgré tout, les conditions de vie sont bonnes (restaurants, salles de sports, activités culturelles, etc.). Couvre-feu à 20h00 et zones de déplacement limitées. Aménagement fréquent des horaires du couvre-feu en fonction de la situation sécuritaire. Le logement est en appartement partagé avec un autre Personnel International, Internet en wifi.
· Vous avez déjà des expériences avérées dans la formation et le transfert de compétences ainsi que dans l’écriture de procédures logistiques
· Vous possédez déjà des expériences management, vous savez faire progresser et développer l’autonomie de vos collaborateurs, vous savez vous positionner pour avancer, vous savez simplifier et prioriser
· Vous possédez les compétences métiers indispensables : maintenance, sûreté, planification, achats, approvisionnement, gestion des stocks et des transports
· Vous êtes à l’aise dans la veille, la réponse et la préparation aux urgences
· Vous êtes capable de travailler sous pression avec de multiples sollicitations et à gérer le stress
Chez HI, les conditions de départ sont à la hauteur de votre engagement et adaptées au contexte de votre mission. Une attention particulière est portée aux questions de santé et à votre situation personnelle : https://hi.org/fr/travailler-chez-hi
· Contrat International de 12 mois à compter de début juin 2026 basé à Port au Prince ;
· Le contrat international permet une couverture sociale adaptée aux besoins de chacun :
Assurance chômage prélevée uniquement pour les ressortissants de l’UE ;
Assurance retraite ;
Couverture santé, rapatriement, prévoyance prises en charge par HI et par l’employé ;
· Salaire : à partir de 2869 € brut/mois ;
· Perdiem : 1060 € net/mois – versé en monnaie locale sur le terrain ;
· Hardship : 500 € net/mois 
· Congés payés : 25 jours par an ;
· R&R : selon niveau de la mission : 5 Jours toutes les 8 semaines 
· Poste : Non accompagné :
o A partir de 12 mois de mission : une allocation enfant de 100 € versée à partir de 2 enfants à charge, versé en monnaie locale sur le terrain ;
· Logement : Collectif pris en charge par HI ;
· Si vous êtes résident(e) dans le pays : package local

Non-governmental, non-religious, non-political and non-profit making, it works alongside people with disabilities, whatever the context, offering them assistance and supporting them in their efforts to become self-reliant. Since its creation, the organisation has set up programmes in approximately 60 countries and intervened in many emergency situations. It has a network of eight national associations (Belgium, Canada, France, Germany, Luxembourg, Switzerland, United Kingdom, USA) which provide human and financial resources, manage projects and raise awareness of Handicap International's actions and campaigns.

title: Sales Manager
description_text:

Place where curiosity is key: here, we share knowledge and learn in training courses, conferences or business trips.

Celebrating achievements and having fun together in team building, summer festivals, and other important occasions.

If you have questions, do not hesitate to contact our recruitment colleague Anna Nikitina by email anna.nikitina@teltonika-iot.com.ua

title: Ads Campaign Manager / Strategist (Meta & Google Ads) - A288
description_text:
Industry
AdTech / Performance Marketing / Digital Advertising
Work Arrangement
Fully remote with required overlap in EST working hours
Job Type
Full-time
Work Schedule
Monday to Friday — 40 hours per week (EST)
Locations:
LATAM (Brazil, Colombia, Mexico, Argentina)
Philippines
Other remote regions with strong English proficiency and digital marketing experience
About Pearl Talent
Pearl works with the top 1% of candidates from around the world and connects them with the best startups in the US and EU. Our clients have raised over $5B in aggregate and are backed by companies like OpenAI, a16z, and Founders Fund. They’re looking for the sharpest, hungriest candidates who they can consistently promote and work with over many years. Candidates we’ve hired have been flown out to the US and EU to work with their clients, and even promoted to roles that match folks onshore in the US.
Hear why we exist, what we believe in, and who we’re building for: WATCH HERE
Why Work with Us?
At Pearl, we’re not just another recruiting firm—we connect you with exceptional opportunities to work alongside visionary US and EU founders. Our focus is on placing you in roles where you can grow, be challenged, and build long-term, meaningful careers.
About the Company
Our client is a performance-driven digital advertising organization focused on helping businesses generate high-quality leads and scalable growth through paid media. They operate in a fast-paced, data-driven environment and emphasize operational excellence, consistency, and long-term partnerships. The team values reliability, structured execution, and continuous optimization across advertising channels.
Role Overview
The Ads Campaign Manager / Strategist will own the full lifecycle of Meta and Google Ads campaigns, from strategy and launch to optimization and scaling. This role sits within a performance marketing environment where data, experimentation, and execution quality directly impact revenue outcomes. You will work cross-functionally with creative, CRO, and account teams to improve funnel performance and conversion efficiency. The work is highly execution-focused, analytical, and detail-oriented. This role is best suited for someone dependable, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple campaigns independently in a structured system.
Your Impact
You will directly influence client acquisition and revenue growth through consistent campaign optimization and data-driven decision-making. Your work will reduce cost per lead, improve lead quality, and support scalable paid media systems. By maintaining reliable execution and clean account structures, you will enable leadership to confidently delegate and scale operations. Campaign Strategy & Execution – 35%
Develop and implement full-funnel strategies across Meta and Google Ads platforms. 
Launch, manage, and optimize campaigns across Search, Display, YouTube, and paid social. 
Build and test audiences, creatives, ad copy, and bidding strategies. 
Conduct keyword research, competitive analysis, and funnel evaluations. 
Performance Optimization – 25%
Analyze campaign performance daily to reduce CPL and improve lead quality. 
Execute structured A/B tests across creatives, copy, audiences, and landing pages. 
Troubleshoot tracking, attribution, and conversion discrepancies. 
Collaborate with CRO teams to improve landing page conversion rates. 
Account Ownership & Reporting – 20%

Monitor tracking, tagging, and conversion accuracy across platforms. 
Identify scaling opportunities and proactively flag risks or inefficiencies. 
Creative & Messaging Collaboration – 10%
Brief creative teams on performance-driven ad requirements. 
Share insights for new messaging angles and creative testing frameworks. 
Ensure alignment between ad creative and landing page experiences. 
Cross-Functional Collaboration – 10%
Work closely with senior ads specialists, CRO teams, creatives, and account managers. 
Participate in onboarding, training sessions, and optimization workshops. 
Contribute insights to process improvements and campaign documentation.
Must-Haves (Required)
2–4+ years of hands-on experience managing Meta and Google Ads campaigns. 
Strong expertise in at least one platform with working proficiency in the other. 
Proven ability to reduce CPL, improve lead quality, and scale paid campaigns. 
Solid understanding of funnels, landing pages, CRO, and conversion tracking. 
Demonstrated dependability, ownership, and consistent work history. 
Excellent English communication skills for internal collaboration. 
Highly organized, detail-oriented, and process-driven.

Self-managed, proactive, and able to ramp quickly with minimal oversight.

title: Parking Agent - Ηράκλειο
description_text:
Η Enterprise Rent-A-Car, μέλος του Ομίλου Σφακιανάκη, με ηγετική θέση στον κλάδο της αυτοκίνησης αναζητά για το κατάστημά της στον Διεθνή Αερολιμένα Ηρακλείου: 
Parking Agent 
Βασικές αρμοδιότητες:
Παραλαμβάνει και παραδίδει τα οχήματα στους πελάτες στο χώρο του Ρarking
Διασφαλίζει την έγκαιρη μεταφορά των οχημάτων
Επιθεωρεί τα αυτοκίνητα πριν και μετά από κάθε ενοικίαση για την αξιολόγηση της κατάστασής τους και την τήρηση αναφορών για πιθανές ζημιές
Εξασφαλίζει τη βέλτιστη ικανοποίηση των πελατών
Προφίλ υποψηφίου:
Απόφοιτος Λυκείου
Επιθυμητή προϋπηρεσία σε αντίστοιχη θέση στο χώρο των ενοικιάσεων αυτοκινήτων
Καλή γνώση της Αγγλικής γλώσσας (γραπτά και προφορικά)
Καλή γνώση MS Office
Ευχάριστη προσωπικότητα με ευχέρεια στην επικοινωνία
Υπευθυνότητα, ευελιξία και ομαδικό πνεύμα συνεργασίας
Κάτοχος άδειας οδήγησης αυτοκινήτου (απαραίτητο)
Παροχές Εταιρίας:
Ανταγωνιστικό πακέτο αποδοχών & παροχών
Δυναμικό & σύγχρονο περιβάλλον εργασίας
Συνεχής εκπαίδευση και ανάπτυξη
Ευκαιρίες επαγγελματικής εξέλιξης
ai_core_responsibilities: The Parking Agent is responsible for receiving and delivering vehicles to customers in the parking area and ensuring the timely transfer of vehicles. Key duties also involve inspecting vehicles before and after each rental to assess their condition and maintain damage reports.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must be high school graduates and possess a valid car driver's license, which is mandatory. Desirable qualifications include previous experience in car rentals and good written and spoken English skills, along with proficiency in MS Office.
linkedin_org_slogan: Automotive
linkedin_org_locations: 5 Σιδηροκάστρου, Αθήνα, Αττική 118 55, GR
linkedin_org_description: Sfakianakis Group, with a continuous presence in the car market since 1961, is today one of the largest, most dynamic and growing groups in the automotive industry in Greece, with various activities covering a wide range of automotive services.

title: F5 Professional Services Consultant
description_text:
Job Overview
At C-Serv, we believe that our employees are key to our success. Our focus on fostering a collaborative environment and investing in professional development ensures our team members are equipped to deliver outstanding solutions. As part of our commitment, we provide extensive training and certification opportunities to empower you in your role.
Our core value is that "our people are our key asset.” 
The Opportunity
We are seeking a F5 Professional Services Consultant to join our team, managing key government contracts in the MENA. This role involves both on-site in Cario and remote work through out MENA and targets individuals experienced in F5 product design, configuration, and deployment. You will leverage your analytical skills and technical knowledge to enhance service delivery and support a diverse range of clients. As a consultant, you will possess the confidence, technical expertise, and interpersonal skills needed to lead efforts in delivering exceptional technical solutions, guiding complex troubleshooting, and conducting thorough technology health checks.
Responsibilities and Duties:
1. Enhance your proficiency with F5 products and technologies through continuous self-directed learning and formal training.
2. Assume technical responsibilities including systems architecture definition, hardware/software specifications, design, implementation, testing, client training, and solution deployment.
3. Engage in consulting activities such as new installations, migrations, upgrades, configurations, iRules creation, security updates, and troubleshooting across various F5 product engagements.
4. Identify and capitalize on additional product or service opportunities within client organizations.
5. Cultivate strong relationships with partners and customers throughout project scoping, work development, delivery, integration, documentation, and follow-up.
6. Perform basic project management tasks including status reporting, time tracking, and expectation management regarding work product deliverables and associated risks.
7. Utilize F5 BIG-IP software for automation or orchestration of deployment tasks and architect cloud deployment strategies using related technologies.
8. Provide engineering expertise focused on application security, with an emphasis on L7 WAF capabilities and strategies to mitigate DoS and BOT attacks.
Knowledge, Skills, Abilities, and Qualifications:
1. Minimum of 5 years’ relevant experience focusing on the architecture and design of network or system infrastructure, including performance and management.
2. At least 3 years’ experience in customer-facing roles as a consultant or engineer.
3. Proficient in working with F5 LTM, , alongside advanced modules like Viprion and iRules for 3 years.
4. Experience with configuring AFM with IP intelligence (IPI) is essential.
5. Valid F5 certifications such as 101, 201, 301a, 301b, and 302 or above will be advantageous.
6. Strong understanding of OSI layers 5 to 7 interactions.
7. Familiarity with web technologies such as HTTP protocol, SSL certificates, and web server administration, including Apache or Microsoft Internet Information Services.
Why Join?
Opportunity to manage high-impact engagements for leading enterprise and government customers.
Work alongside world-class F5 engineers and consultants.
Join a global organisation delivering cutting-edge networking and security solutions.
ai_core_responsibilities: The consultant will assume technical responsibilities including system architecture definition, design, implementation, testing, and solution deployment for F5 product engagements. Duties also involve engaging in consulting activities such as new installations, migrations, upgrades, security updates, and guiding complex troubleshooting.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have a minimum of 5 years of experience focusing on network or system infrastructure architecture and design, with at least 3 years in customer-facing consulting roles. Proficiency with F5 LTM, Viprion, iRules for 3 years, and experience configuring AFM with IP intelligence (IPI) are essential.

title: Video Content Creator
description_text:
1- JOB PURPOSE:
As a Video Content Creator, you’ll craft short-form videos that captivate audiences across social platforms. From ideation to filming and editing, you’ll turn ideas into visually stunning, platform-native content that drives engagement, shapes trends, and transforms brand messages. You’ll collaborate with internal teams and contribute to impactful digital campaigns.
2- RESPONSIBILITIES AND TASKS: 
Conceptualize and create engaging and original short-form video content for Tiktok, Instagram Reels and any platform supporting vertical content that aligns with the brand's voice and objectives. 
Stay ahead of trends, challenges, and cultural moments to implement relevant and timely content into the social strategy.
Collaborate closely with our marketing team to understand campaign goals and messaging, translating them into visual narratives. 
Execute end-to-end video production, including ideation, filming, editing, sound design, and visual effects, to deliver polished and high-quality content that can be used on different platforms. 
Experiment with different video styles, techniques, and formats to keep content fresh and appealing to diverse audiences. 
Analyse video performance metrics, insights, and adapt content strategies to drive engagement and growth.
3- JOB SPECIFICATIONS:
Education
Bachelor’s degree in a related field
Experience
2-3 years at least of relevant content creation/videography projects
Country KSA
Skills
● A solid portfolio of vertical content, other formats are a plus.
● A deep understanding of Vertical's platform, trends, challenges, and its unique community culture.
● Great knowledge of mobile videography and ability to shoot with a camera as well [sony a7s or fx models]
● Proficiency in video editing software specially capcut & mobile software and creative tools to produce visually appealing and well-edited content.
● Strong visual and storytelling skills, with an eye for detail and a knack for capturing attention quickly.
● Ability to match ongoing trends to tactical creative content pieces ● Ability to adapt to a fast-paced environment, juggle multiple projects, and meet tight deadlines without compromising quality.
● Excellent communication skills, both in collaborating with team members and engaging with the Vertical audience.
Toolset
● Great knowledge of mobile videography with Iphone and/or Samsung flagship models
● Ability to shoot with mirrorless cameras, e.g., Sony A7S series or FX series.
● Familiarity with various video and sound equipment, including gimbals, tripods, microphones, and lighting setups.
● Extensive experience with mobile editing tools (in-app editors such as TikTok and Instagram, CapCut) and PC editing software (Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve).
● Solid understanding of AI workflows; motion graphics skills are a plus.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Video Content Creator will conceptualize and create engaging short-form videos for social media platforms. They will collaborate with the marketing team to align video content with campaign goals and execute the entire video production process.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a bachelor's degree and 2-3 years of relevant experience in content creation or videography. A solid portfolio and proficiency in video editing software are essential, along with strong storytelling skills.

title: Insights and Reporting Manager
description_text:
The world of payment processing is rapidly evolving, and businesses are looking for loyal and strategic partners, to help them grow.
Meet Nuvei, the Canadian fintech company accelerating the business of clients around the world. Nuvei's modular, flexible and scalable technology allows leading companies to accept next-gen payments, offer all payout options and benefit from card issuing, banking, risk and fraud management services. Connecting businesses to their customers in more than 200 markets, with local acquiring in 50 markets, 150 currencies and 700 alternative payment methods, Nuvei provides the technology and insights for customers and partners to succeed locally and globally with one integration.
At Nuvei, we live our core values, and we thrive on solving complex problems. We’re dedicated to continually improving our product and providing relentless customer service. We are always looking for exceptional talent to join us on the journey!
Your Mission
We are looking for a Insights and Reporting Manager to join our fast-growing Insights and Reporting team. Reporting to our Senior Insights and Reporting Manager, you will be supporting the team on shaping the success of our Commercial Sales teams with a key focus on managing and enhancing our core reference datasets.
Key Responsibilities
Reference Data Governance: Establish and maintain standards for reference data, ensuring alignment across systems
Data Quality Management: Monitor, validate, and cleanse reference data to maintain accuracy and integrity.
Process Development: Design and implement processes for updating and managing reference data, including version control and audit trails.
Collaboration: Work closely with Commercial, Finance, Product, and Operations teams to understand data requirements and resolve discrepancies.
Global Support: Flexible global support to our Commercial Teams across multiple time zones
Reporting Enablement: Ensure reference data supports accurate reporting and analytics in tools such as Power BI and Salesforce.
Pricing Support: Build out the key pricing datasets and support price, cost and profit analysis.
Continuous Improvement: Identify opportunities to automate and streamline data management processes.
Documentation: Maintain clear documentation of data dictionaries, reference data structures, processes, and governance policies.
Bachelor’s degree required in Business, Maths, Economics, Science or related fields.
Proven experience in data management, data governance, or master data management. 
Familiarity with CRM systems (e.g. Salesforce) and BI tools (e.g. Power BI, DAX, PowerQuery, SQL/TSQL).
Strong understanding of data modelling, data warehousing, schemas, views and relationships 
Strong numeracy skills and the ability to interpret complex data.
Strong attention to detail and analytical mindset.
Ability to manage large datasets and ensure data integrity.
Excellent communication skills for working with cross-functional teams.
Nuvei is an equal-opportunity employer that celebrates collaboration and innovation and is committed to developing a diverse and inclusive workplace. The team at Nuvei is comprised of a wealth of talent, skill, and ambition. We believe that employees are happiest when they’re empowered to be their true, authentic selves. So, please come as you are. We can’t wait to meet you. 
Private Health Care
Provident Fund
Competitive holiday allowance
Gym Membership
Working Language
English (written and spoken) is the language used most of the time, as work colleagues, clients, and strategic suppliers are geographically dispersed.
Our recruitment process may use automated tools, including AI, to support application management and candidate shortlisting.
ai_core_responsibilities: The manager will focus on managing and enhancing core reference datasets to support the success of Commercial Sales teams, involving establishing standards for reference data and ensuring its accuracy and integrity across systems. Key duties include designing update processes, collaborating with various departments, and ensuring data supports accurate reporting in tools like Power BI and Salesforce.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must hold a Bachelor's degree in Business, Maths, Economics, Science, or related fields, coupled with proven experience in data management, governance, or master data management. Essential technical skills include familiarity with CRM systems (Salesforce) and BI tools (Power BI, DAX, PowerQuery, SQL/TSQL), alongside strong data modeling understanding and excellent analytical capabilities.

title: Business Development Representative (m/f/d)
description_text:
At Speexx, we are building the future of learning - Speexx is the digital coaching platform for language training, business coaching and skills assessment in large international organizations. We use groundbreaking AI and a global network of certified top coaches to help large organizations bring out the best in their people. 
We strive every day to offer our employees a workplace environment that fosters inclusion and a sense of belonging, where everyone feels recognized, valued, and respected. And we are looking for curious and motivated individuals to join the team and grow with us. If this sounds like you – what are you waiting for? Apply now for the position of 
Business Development Representative in Italy
You get excited about working with people, marketing and data - and you want to be in an agile SaaS environment. At Speexx, you will be responsible for finding and qualifying potential customers for our international sales teams.

You will use a variety of sources including our vast customer base, latest prospecting technology and our ongoing marketing campaigns. The role is a vital one as you will be a major contributor for the organization’s sales pipeline, converting leads into real business opportunities for our sales team.
What you will do 
Build and manage a healthy sales pipeline through data-driven outbound activities (cold calls, email, LinkedIn). 
Turn data and touchpoints from the entire marketing funnel into real business opportunities. 
Research target accounts, with a focus on Public Administration and B2G, and identify key stakeholders. 
Use CRM and outbound tools (e.g. Outreach, LinkedIn Sales Navigator) to manage leads and ensure accurate data tracking. 
Collaborate with Sales and Marketing teams to support campaigns, events, and lead handover. 
Monitor KPIs, report on results, and continuously optimize prospecting activities. 
Share market and prospect insights with Marketing and Management.
Provide feedback (prospect needs, industry trends, market perception, competitive intelligence, etc.) to both management and the company’s marketing team
What we look for
1–3 years of experience in a BDR/SDR or similar B2B sales role.
Ability to work in a fast moving B2B business environment
Excellent quantitative skills and an analytical, data-driven mindset as well a passion for testing, analyzing and iterating
Hands-on experience with CRM systems and outbound tools.
Interest in the HR and people development market is a strong plus.
Understand and work with data driven prospecting campaigns is a great plus
Results driven and sales oriented.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills in Italian
Excellent command in spoken and written English
Your benefits
You will be working in a highly international and agile environment with amazing team members from offices and locations around the globe, including Munich, Madrid, Milan, Paris, Sao Paulo and Shanghai.
Flexible Working Hours. We don't believe that a rigid 9 am - 5 pm is the right path to a great work-life balance, so we give you the flexibility do your best work in a way that works for you and your team.
Hybrid Office Model. You can choose between working fully from our office in Pavia or working from home up to 4 days per week and go one day per week to the office. 
Wellbeing initiatives. We care about our Speexxies: Get fresh food delivery for lunch, participate in our welfare programs (Jakala), get psychological support with Stimulus, or permission hours for volunteering. 
Culture of Learning. Take a deep dive into our Speexx Academy, participate in our global Mentoring program, visit internal workshops or third-party training and last but not least enjoy our Speexx peer exchanges.
Award winning Language Training. There is nothing to add - maybe that this also goes for your friends and family, they get discount on our world class language training.
Our Hiring Adjustments & Experiences

At Speexx, we are searching for individuals with varied skill sets, backgrounds, and experiences who can help enrich our culture even further. Even if you still need to meet every requirement, we encourage you to apply. Don't let the confidence gap or imposture syndrome keep you from shining! 
Just like our personalized people development solutions, our recruitment is not one-size-fits-all. Please let us know if you need any adjustments throughout the hiring process. 

We're looking forward to hearing from you!

About Speexx
Speexx is a Time Magazine Top Edtech company and the leading platform for people development in the digital workplace. Built on the latest AI technology and supported by a global network of expert trainers and coaches, it provides digital business coaching, corporate language training, intercultural programs, strategic mentoring services, and skills assessment to large organizations. Trusted by 1,800+ organizations and used by over 8 million users globally, Speexx delivers 350,000 one-to-one sessions each year. Available in more than 50 languages, Speexx is one of the most widely adopted people development solutions worldwide.

title: Platforms & Products Security Manager
locations_alt_raw: London, Belfast, Great Britain, United Kingdom
description_text:
At Digital Catapult, we're accelerating the practical application of deep technologies to equip the UK to be future-ready. From AI and advanced media to digital twins, quantum research and next-generation mobile networking, we work at the cutting edge of what's possible. And now we need an enthusiastic Platforms & Products Security Manager who can bring dedicated security expertise into these innovation domains. You'll assess security posture across our emerging tech platforms, design governance frameworks that enable innovation, and extend our ISO 27001 ISMS into research, experimental, and proof-of-concept environments. You'll partner with product teams to standardise security practices, mentor teams toward secure innovation, and help emerging technologies move safely toward production.
WHAT YOU’LL DO (Duties)
Assess security risk and maturity across AI systems, advanced media production, mobile networking test labs, digital twins, quantum research, and other emerging tech initiatives to understand their security posture, complexity and readiness for production.
Prioritise security hardening efforts based on genuine risk, not compliance checklists.
Design and implement security governance frameworks and decision-making processes that embed security without creating bureaucratic friction.
Partner with product teams to improve and standardise security practices, sharing guidance and providing support, training and mentorship without direct authority.
Extend and tailor our ISMS to cover emerging tech domains, balancing compliance with the unique constraints of experimental environments.
Maintain security posture as experimental systems mature toward production.
You’ll bring strong and demonstrable security experience in complex, fast-moving technical environments, with a genuine track record of:
Risk judgment in experimental contexts – You assess maturity and identify gaps in complex environments; you're comfortable with proportionate, context-aware decisions where textbook solutions don't exist. Previous experience conducting or leading ISO 27001 risk assessments and translating findings into actionable recommendations. Familiarity with other security standards / guidance such as Cyber Essentials Plus would be highly beneficial.
ISMS design and governance – You've designed, extended, or tailored security frameworks for diverse organisational contexts; you know how to adapt requirements for research vs. production and established decision-making processes.
Influence without authority – You've shaped security practices in teams where you had no direct reporting relationship; you’ll have strong stakeholder management, interpersonal and communication skills and experience of translating technical concepts into understandable business language and build credibility and trust through expertise.
Emerging tech exposure – You've worked with AI/ML, cloud, advanced media production, IoT, digital twins, quantum, mobile networking, or similar emerging domains; you're comfortable learning / understanding new technical spaces rapidly.
Pragmatism – You distinguish genuine risks from box-ticking; you support innovation while holding the line where it matters; you're resilient in the face of pushback. You hold CISSP, CISM, or equivalent professional security certification demonstrating advanced security knowledge and commitment to the field. An ISO 27001 Lead Auditor qualification is desirable, and emerging tech security certifications (AI security, quantum-safe cryptography, etc.) would be an advantage. Ideally, you've worked in innovation-driven, research-focused, or deep-tech organisations where balancing security with pace is critical.
Deadline for Applications: 22nd February 2026
Commitment to Equality, Diversity and Inclusion
We recognise and value the advantages and opportunities that come with having people from diverse backgrounds working with us and it is our ambition to build an organisation which is representative and reflective of UK society. ￼
We welcome applications from neurodivergent candidates, candidates from minority and underrepresented groups and from candidates with more or less experience, provided the requisite skills can be demonstrated.
As members of the Disability Confident Scheme, we guarantee to interview all disabled applicants who meet the minimum criteria for the vacancy. Please do speak with us about adjustments that could support you through our interview process.
Digital Catapult is an equal opportunities employer.
We are in the UK’s Top 100 Best Workplaces and placed in the UK’s Best Workplaces in Tech and Large Organisations.
Digital Catapult is a Disability Confident Committed Level 1 Employer.
Excellent holiday package: 25 days annual leave, Bank Holidays and 3 days between Christmas and New Year:
Double-matched pension up to 10% of your salary;
Discretionary company bonus
4% of your salary to use towards selecting benefits that work for you, including health cash plan, Private Medical Insurance; buying holiday, topping up your pension;
E-Vehicle Scheme; Cycle2Work; Tech Scheme; Gym Discounts; Give As you Earn; PerkPal;
Life insurance 4x salary;
Free to access EAP & Financial Wellbeing advice;
Enhanced maternity and paternity leave;
Hybrid working - with great offices to work from 2 days per week with some roles needing to be onsite more regularly to ensure the successful delivery of our work;
Investment in your ongoing learning and development with us;
Company social events throughout the year and free office snacks!
We have a vibrant and engaging culture where all voices are heard and a variety of employee led affinity groups who champion initiatives and provide opportunities for feedback to be shared.
We use moments in the year to educate everyone at Digital Catapult on different aspects of Equity, Diversity and Inclusion and to raise awareness.
We also enjoy socialising and having fun together through a variety of company-wide events held throughout the year including our football team, running and climbing groups and volunteering activities.

title: Recruitment Coordinator
description_text:
Job Overview
We are excited to announce an opening for a Recruitment Coordinator at Remote Recruitment, a leading consultancy focused on providing tailored talent solutions across diverse industries. This role is pivotal in ensuring a seamless recruitment process and enhancing candidate experience while supporting the recruitment team in delivering on their hiring goals.
As the Recruitment Coordinator, you will manage the logistics and administrative tasks associated with the recruitment cycle. From scheduling interviews to liaising with candidates and internal teams, you’ll play a crucial role in fostering relationships and maintaining organized processes. If you are detail-oriented, proactive, and have a passion for recruitment, this is the perfect opportunity for you!
Key Responsibilities
Coordinate and schedule interviews between candidates and hiring managers across various time zones.
Communicate effectively with candidates to ensure a positive recruitment experience.
Maintain and update the applicant tracking system (ATS) and ensure data accuracy.
Assist in the preparation of recruitment materials and reports for internal meetings.
Provide general administrative support to the recruitment team, including managing calendars and creating agendas.
Help facilitate onboarding processes for new hires, including document collection and orientation scheduling.
Collaborate with hiring managers to ensure alignment on recruitment strategies and timelines.
Monitor and respond to candidate inquiries via emails and phone calls.
Proactively identify areas for process improvement and contribute to the overall efficiency of the recruitment process.
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field preferred.
Minimum of 2 years of experience in recruitment coordination or administrative support roles.
Strong attention to detail and excellent organizational skills.
Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with a professional demeanor.
Familiarity with ATS software and recruitment processes.
Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment.
Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook) and Google Workspace.
Knowledge of employment laws and best practices is a plus.
Must have a reliable laptop and stable internet connection.
Monthly Salary: R25,000 – R28,000 (depending on experience and fit) 
Full-time, long-term remote position
Opportunity to work with a UK consultancy expanding into the UAE market – international exposure and career growth 
Direct access to a supportive, founder-led business with mentorship and trust 
Be part of an exciting podcast project, coordinating senior guests and gaining industry insight 
Dynamic and varied role – from sourcing and admin to BD and campaigns
ai_core_responsibilities: The Recruitment Coordinator will manage logistics and administrative tasks associated with the recruitment cycle, including scheduling interviews and liaising with candidates. This role is crucial in enhancing the candidate experience and supporting the recruitment team in achieving their hiring goals.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a bachelor's degree in Human Resources or a related field and a minimum of 2 years of experience in recruitment coordination or administrative support roles. Strong attention to detail, exceptional communication skills, and familiarity with ATS software are also required.
linkedin_org_slogan: Remote Recruitment operates as a full-service employment agency providing recruitment/staffing for UK based companies
linkedin_org_locations: Suite 6 Salts Farm, Rye, GB
linkedin_org_description:
REMOTE RECRUITMENT is a remote jobs recruitment agency that assists UK-based companies with finding the best talent for their needs. We operate as a full-service employment agency providing recruitment/staffing for the following specialist fields:

- Marketing specialists
- Sales
- Assistants/admin

We source talent and handle the entire process on your behalf, based on your company’s needs for each role. We also take care of background checks and contracts to ensure you focus your attention where it’s needed, on your business.

title: Clinical Business System Expert
description_text:
About the Job
Join Excelya, where Audacity, Care, and Energy define who we are and how we work. We believe in creating bold solutions and fostering an inclusive environment where collaboration and individual growth go hand in hand.
This role is an exciting opportunity to contribute to a dynamic, ambitious team. You will play a critical part in driving innovation and making an impact in the clinical research space, while enjoying a stimulating professional environment that encourages personal and intellectual growth.
Main Responsibilities
Ensure the high performance and reliability of clinical information systems supporting the acquisition, cleaning and analysis of clinical trial data (e.g. Oracle Clinical One, eCRF, DMW).
Act as a key interface between Business and IT teams, ensuring alignment between operational needs and system capabilities.
Monitor, track and follow up on technical issues in collaboration with DDS, ensuring timely and effective resolution.
Identify, represent and advocate for end‑user needs with Information Systems, QA teams and external providers.
Ensure that clinical systems are properly maintained, updated and used in compliance with internal procedures and regulatory requirements (ICH‑GxP).
Contribute to the deployment, upgrade and validation of computerized systems, in line with clinical and regulatory standards.
Ensure that end users are adequately trained and supported in the use of clinical systems.
Monitor system usage and deviations, and propose corrective and preventive actions (CAPA) when necessary.
Oversee operational system activities and ensure proper documentation and traceability.
Collaborate closely with a referent Business System Expert and the broader Clinical System Management team.
About You
At Excelya, taking audacious steps is encouraged, so we're looking for individuals who are ready to grow with us and share our values.
Experience: Proven experience in managing international clinical operations (avoid requiring minimum years—talent matters most to us!). 
Skills: Proven experience in electronic Data Capture (eDC) systems, Clinical trial regulations (ICH-GxP), Computerized system validation;
Education: Master's degree in a relevant field.
Languages: Fluency in French and English is mandatory.
Why Join Us?
At Excelya, we combine passion for science with enthusiasm for teamwork to redefine excellence in healthcare.
Here's what makes us unique
We are a young, ambitious health company representing 900 Excelyates, driven to become Europe's leading mid-size CRO with the best employee experience. Our one-stop provider service model—offering full-service, functional service provider, and consulting—enables you to evolve through diverse projects. Working alongside preeminent experts, you will help improve scientific, operational, and human knowledge to enhance the patient's journey.
Excelling with care means benefiting from an environment that values your natural talents, pushes boundaries with audacity, and nurtures your potential, allowing you to contribute fully to our shared mission
ai_core_responsibilities: The role ensures the high performance and reliability of clinical information systems used for data acquisition, cleaning, and analysis, while acting as the key interface between Business and IT teams for system alignment. Responsibilities also include monitoring technical issues, advocating for end-user needs, and ensuring system compliance with regulatory standards.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess proven experience in managing international clinical operations, specifically with electronic Data Capture (eDC) systems, Clinical trial regulations (ICH-GxP), and Computerized system validation. A Master's degree in a relevant field is required, along with mandatory fluency in both French and English.
linkedin_org_slogan: Expertly delivering clinical trials operations, with care.
