linkedin_org_description:
Excelya is an independent partner that serves Biotech, Pharma, and Medical Device organizations with a comprehensive range of Full-service CRO, FSP, and Resourcing solutions guided by compassion, care, and excellence. 

Founded in 2014 and headquartered in Paris, France, and operating in 28 countries across Europe, USA and India, Excelya has a global team of 900+ experts who understand the critical needs of clients to provide bespoke and robust trial solutions across a broad spectrum of therapeutic areas, with speciality focus on Oncology & Hematology, Rare Disease & Pediatrics, Infectious Disease, Inflammation & Immunotherapy, Pain Treatment & CNS, and Late Phase & RWE.

title: Copywriter
description_text:
JOB PURPOSE:
The job holder will be responsible for crafting persuasive and engaging written content that drives brand awareness and consumer action across multiple advertising channels. The Copywriter will transform strategic insights into compelling narratives that resonate with diverse audiences, while ensuring all messaging aligns with brand voice, campaign objectives, and platform nuances. Working in close collaboration with designers, art directors, and strategists, the Copywriter plays a central role in shaping integrated campaigns, from conceptual thinking to final execution.
RESPONSIBILITIES AND TASKS:
Collaborate with the creative team to develop innovative concepts and compelling copy for various advertising platforms and campaigns.
Write clear, persuasive, and impactful content for ads, social media, and campaigns that align with client objectives and brand voice.
Play an active role in creative strategy and planning by contributing insights and recommendations during campaign development.
Tailor content based on marketing strategies, audience insights, and brand positioning to ensure maximum effectiveness and relevance.
Work closely with designers and strategists to ensure cohesive and aligned messaging throughout all creative executions.
Confidently present ideas to both internal teams and clients with clear rationale and strategic backing.
Stay up to date with industry trends and best practices in copywriting to maintain competitive edge and creative freshness.
Develop and maintain brand tone of voice guidelines for consistent communication across all client touchpoints.
Create compelling headlines, taglines, and calls-to-action that capture attention and drive desired consumer behaviors.
Adapt content for different cultural contexts and market segments while maintaining brand consistency and message effectiveness.
Proofread and edit all written materials to ensure accuracy, clarity, and adherence to brand standards before final approval.
Collaborate on integrated campaigns by ensuring copy seamlessly works across print, digital, outdoor, and broadcast media formats.
Perform any other related task as assigned by management.
JOB SPECIFICATIONS:
Education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Journalism, English Literature, or related field.
Experience: 3-5 years of experience as a copywriter, ideally within a creative or digital advertising agency environment with demonstrated campaign success.
Skills
Exceptional writing and storytelling abilities across multiple formats and platforms.
Skilled in writing for digital platforms (social media, ads, websites, email marketing).
Bilingual fluency in both Arabic and English with cultural sensitivity.
Proficient in using AI tools for content creation and optimization.
Strong presentation and client communication skills.
Excellent research and analytical abilities to understand target audiences.
Creative thinking and conceptual development capabilities.
Time management skills with ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously.
Knowledge of advertising principles and marketing fundamentals.
Portfolio demonstrating ability to craft engaging and effective campaign content.
Working Conditions
The work environment is fast-paced and deadline-driven
ai_core_responsibilities: The Copywriter is responsible for crafting persuasive and engaging written content across multiple advertising channels to drive brand awareness and consumer action. This involves transforming strategic insights into compelling narratives that align with brand voice and campaign objectives.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in a relevant field and 3-5 years of copywriting experience, ideally within an agency setting with demonstrated campaign success. Essential skills include exceptional writing, bilingual fluency in Arabic and English, proficiency with AI tools, and strong presentation capabilities.

title: Financial Controller
locations_alt_raw: Milan, Metropolitan City of Milan, Italy
description_text:
ABOUT US
P3 is a long-term investor, manager and developer of European warehouse properties with more than 9,7 million m² of assets under management and land bank of 2 million m² for further development.
P3 has commercial activities in 11 countries and has been investing and developing in European markets for over two decades. And because we care about our customers and communities where we operate, we develop environmentally friendly, sustainable warehouses to the highest international standards.
Headquartered in Prague, P3 employs more than 270 people with 25+ nationalities across 11 offices in key European cities, offering integrated development, asset and property management services.
Attracting the right talents is key for our future. We are looking for ambitious and passionate experts who can help us make P3 THE leading logistics warehouse provider in Europe.

OUR CULTURE
Our company values - Integrity, Teamwork, Excellence, Ambition - are embedded deeply within the organisation, and guide our steps every single day. P3’s size and stability enable us to take a global view and yet at the same time we are just the right size to maintain our agile and flexible approach on local real estate markets.
Together, we create an environment that encourages personal growth because we know we are successful mainly thanks to the people who make P3. We recognise and reward outstanding performance and motivate people to contribute to our mutual goals and turn their good ideas into great outcomes. We encourage people to have ownership, make decisions and accept responsibility for them.

WE ARE LOOKING FOR
We are seeking a Financial Controller to join our Italian team in Milan. The Financial Controller will be responsible for financial planning, controlling, and reporting activities related to the local real estate portfolio. The role acts as a key business partner to the Finance Manager and local management, ensuring accurate financial information, strong cost control, and forward-looking insights to support decision making.

SOME OF THE INTERESTING CHALLENGES AHEAD OF YOU
Financial Planning, Budgeting & Forecasting
Lead the annual budget process (P&L, property-level and country-level), in coordination with Asset Management and Property Management and Developmennt team.
Coordinate quarterly reforecasting cycles, including variance analysis versus budget and prior forecasts.
Prepare scenario analyses and sensitivity models to assess risks and opportunities across the portfolio.
Financial Reporting & Performance Analysis
Manage the monthly financial reporting process, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and timely delivery.
Prepare monthly country performance packs for local management and Group Finance.
Perform detailed variance analysis (actuals vs budget/forecast) and provide clear explanations.
Monitor portfolio KPIs (NOI, OPEX, vacancy, capex, yields) and highlight performance deviations.
Accounting Oversight & Closing
Coordinate and monitor month-end and year-end closing activities in cooperation with the accounting team (external and internal).
Ensure consistency between management reporting and statutory figures.
Review accounting outputs related to real estate operations (accruals, provisions, reallocations).
Statutory, Tax & Compliance Support
Support statutory reporting processes, including coordination with external advisors.
Participate in the annual CIT calculation review and support tax filings.
Liaise with external auditors, ensuring smooth audit processes and timely completion.
Ensure compliance with Group reporting standards (IFRS) and local regulations.
Systems, Processes & Data Quality
Actively support Yardi reporting and process improvements, including new implementations and automation initiatives.
Ensure correct utilization of shareholder and group reporting templates.
Improve financial processes, controls, and reporting efficiency on a continuous basis.
Support the development of dashboards and reporting tools (e.g. Excel, Power BI).
Business Partnering & Stakeholder Management
Act as a financial business partner to Asset Managers, Property Managers, and local management.
Advise country management on financial impacts of operational and strategic decisions.
Support acquisition-related activities (e.g. funding letters, financial analysis).
Build strong relationships with internal stakeholders and external advisors.

WHAT YOU NEED TO SHINE IN THIS ROLE
Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field;
4+ years of experience in financial controlling, audit, or FP&A, ideally within the logistics or industrial real estate sector;
Strong ownership of financial reporting, including hands-on experience with month-end close and coordination with accounting teams;
Proven track record in financial planning, budgeting, and forecasting within a structured, international matrix organization;
Business-oriented mindset with the ability to understand operational drivers and support decision-making for non-finance stakeholders;
Advanced analytical and technical skills, including expert Excel proficiency and experience with ERP systems (Yardi highly preferred) or BI tools;
High affinity for data and process improvement, with a proactive approach to automation and reporting efficiency;
Extraordinary communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to manage external auditors and advisors;
Fluency in Italian and English languages (both written and spoken).
WHY SHOULD YOU JOIN US
These are some of the benefits we offer:
Stability of an international company (one of the leading industrial real estate developers on the European market).
Dynamic collaborative working environment with a passionate team of colleagues across 11 countries.
Attractive annual bonus.
Generous budget for trainings and continuous development opportunities.
Individual language courses.
Employee assistance programme (individual coaching/mentoring opportunities in wellbeing area).
Flexible/hybrid working policy.
Extra paid days off (vacation, sick days – based on local legislation).
Meal allowance.
We care and we like spending time together so we enjoy company events, team buildings and networking opportunities connected with the support of various charity causes.
Delicious coffee, refreshments and healthy snacks at workplace.
Attractive employee referral bonus in case you make a successful referral for any of the job roles we have open.
Benefits are regulated by P3 internal policy which contains the full details regarding the entitlement and conditions for the benefits. Benefits policy and components may vary by location.
Come and join us and allow your career to flourish in line with the strong and stable growth of the P3 business.
Build your career in a way which is meaningful to you!
IMPORTANT: 
PLEASE PROVIDE YOUR APPLICATION AND RESUME IN ENGLISH LANGUAGE.

Networking opportunities connected with the support of various charity causes

This role also involves coordinating closing activities, ensuring compliance with IFRS, and acting as a key financial business partner to operational teams.

Essential requirements include strong ownership of financial reporting, proven budgeting/forecasting skills in a matrix organization, expert Excel proficiency, and fluency in both Italian and English.

title: Account Manager - Entertainment
description_text:
Job Purposes:
The Account Manager is responsible for managing client relationships, leading day-to-day operations, and ensuring the successful delivery of campaigns. Acting as the main point of contact for clients, the Account Manager balances strategic thinking with flawless project execution. This role might mentor junior team members and collaborate closely with internal departments to maintain high-quality standards, client satisfaction, and account profitability.
Dimensions:
Financial: Responsible for input and monitoring of financial estimates, budgets, and profitability tracking for assigned accounts
Non-Financial: Responsible for client servicing quality, internal coordination, and team development within assigned projects.
Responsibilities and Tasks:
Manage day-to-day operations and serve as the primary client contact on accounts/projects.
Lead on the execution of projects/campaigns from brief to final delivery.
Development of briefs, budgets, and timelines.
Lead meetings both internally and externally with clients.
Identify growth opportunities within existing accounts.
Provide strategic input during planning and creative development, ensuring the work aligns with client objectives and brand strategy.
Report all financial matters related to their respective accounts as per the agency processes.
Support supplier contract negotiations and execution, ensuring compliance, cost effectiveness, and alignment with project requirements.
Do and ensure the accurate and timely posting of social content across designated platforms, adhering to the approved content calendar and brand guidelines.
Handle conflict resolution and problem-solving within accounts to ensure smooth collaboration and client satisfaction.
Report on account financials as per agency processes.
Work Contacts:
Internal: Account Management, Strategy, Creative, Studio, Media, and Finance Teams.
External: Clients, Production Houses, Suppliers, and External Partners.
Job Specifications and Skills:
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Advertising, Business, or a related field.
Experience: 4–6 years of experience in account management or client servicing, including managing medium-to-large accounts within an advertising or marketing agency.
Quality and Delivery
Ability to review and QA all deliverables for accuracy and brand alignment.
Ability to maintain attention to detail under pressure and tight timelines.
Ability to enforce process discipline across briefing, revisions, and approvals.
Client and Strategic Relationships
Ability to act as the main focal point for clients and manage expectations.
Ability to build trust through reliability, responsiveness, and value creation.
Ability to spot upsell and cross-sell opportunities with senior guidance.
Strategic and Analytical
Ability to translate business and marketing objectives into clear briefs.
Ability to connect audience, market, and competitive insights to recommendations.
Ability to align execution with the client’s strategy and KPIs.
Communication and Presentation
Ability to lead external presentations with clarity and structure.
Ability to write concise briefs, contact reports, status updates, and proposals.
Ability to handle difficult conversations with diplomacy and professionalism.
Project and Financial Management
Ability to plan and manage timelines, scopes, resources, and dependencies.
Ability to build estimates and track budgets, billing, and profitability.
Ability to maintain accurate documentation and forecasting per agency processes.
Leadership and Team Development
Ability to coach AEs and SAEs, delegate tasks, and review outputs.
Ability to drive collaboration across strategy, creative, media, studio, and production.
Ability to resolve issues and remove blockers to keep work moving.
Personal Attributes
Strong ownership mindset and accountability for outcomes.
High organization and prioritization in a fast-paced environment.
Proactive problem solving with a solution-first approach.
Digital and Social Execution
Ability to oversee accurate and timely social posting against approved calendars.
Ability to enforce platform best practices and brand guidelines.
Languages and Tools
Fluency in English and Arabic, spoken and written.
Proficiency with presentation, spreadsheet, and project management tools.

This includes developing briefs, managing budgets, leading meetings, and identifying growth opportunities within existing accounts.

Key requirements include strong abilities in quality assurance, strategic thinking, financial tracking, project management, and effective communication with clients and internal teams.

title: Freelance Mathematics Expert with Python Expertise - AI Trainer
description_text:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency. 
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.
What this opportunity involves 
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may: 
Design rigorous mathematics problems reflecting professional practice; 
Evaluate AI solutions for correctness, assumptions, and constraints; 
Validate calculations or simulations using Python (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy); 
Improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic; 
Apply structured scoring criteria to multi-step problems.
What we look for 
This opportunity is a good fit for mathematicians with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have: 
Degree in Mathematics or related fields, e.g. Algebra, Calculus, Number theory, etc. 
3+ years of professional mathematics experience 
Strong written English (C1/C2) 
Strong Python proficiency for numerical validation 
Stable internet connection 
Professional certifications (e.g., CMME, SAS Certifications, CAP) and experience in international or applied projects are an advantage.
How it works 
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations 
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10–20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active. 
Payment 
Paid contributions, with rates up to $10/hour* 
Fixed project rate or individual rates, depending on the project 
Some projects include incentive payments 
*Note: Rates vary based on expertise, skills assessment, location, project needs, and other factors. Higher rates may be offered to highly specialized experts. Lower rates may apply during onboarding or non-core project phases. Payment details are shared per project.
ai_core_responsibilities: Contributors will design rigorous mathematics problems and evaluate AI solutions for correctness. They will also validate calculations using Python and improve AI reasoning.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a degree in Mathematics or related fields and at least 3 years of professional experience. Strong proficiency in Python and written English is also required.

Welcome to Mindrift — a space where innovation meets opportunity. We’re a pioneering platform dedicated to advancing the field of artificial intelligence through collaborative online projects. Our focus lies in creating data for generative AI, offering a unique chance for freelancers to contribute to AI development from anywhere, at any time.

At Mindrift, we believe in the power of collective intelligence to shape the future of AI. Our platform allows users to dive into a variety of tasks — ranging from creating training prompts for AI models to refining AI responses for greater relevance.

Let’s build the future of AI together, one task at a time.

title: AU Bookkeeper (Xero) - Work from home/Dayshift
description_text:
Position Outline
This is a hands‑on finance and administration role suited for a well‑rounded accounting professional capable of managing end‑to‑end bookkeeping and financial operations. Beyond handling daily accounts payable, accounts receivable, and payroll, the role is responsible for ensuring accurate financial data capture, reconciliation, and reporting. A key focus is on financial reporting, data analysis, and budgeting support to help the leadership team track performance, control costs, and plan for growth.
Responsibilities / Duties
Financial Operations & Reconciliation
Perform general reconciliation of books and financial transactions.
Payroll processing.
Maintain and update supplier invoices, ensuring they match statements and are correctly entered in Xero.
Conduct regular account reconciliations, investigate discrepancies, and resolve errors.
Follow up with suppliers regarding outstanding accounts and ensure on-time payments.
Manage collections and accounts receivable as required.
Support company invoicing processes.
Reporting & Compliance
Assist in preparing financial reports and statements.
Ensure compliance with financial regulations and internal company policies.
Maintain accurate and organized financial records.
Process Improvement & Administration
Identify opportunities to improve financial processes and implement streamlined procedures.
Support general administrative and clerical business functions.
Perform other position-level duties as needed.
Qualifications in Accounting, Finance, or Business (Diploma or higher preferred).
Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
Minimum of 5 years’ bookkeeping experience.
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.
Proficiency in Xero accounting software. (Must-have)
Strong attention to detail and accuracy in financial recordkeeping.
Excellent organizational and time management skills.
Strong analytical and problem‑solving abilities.
High integrity and the ability to maintain confidentiality.
Collaborative, team-oriented, flexible, and adaptable.
Familiarity with Accelor is an advantage but not essential.
Why Join Twoconnect?
We offer more than just a job — we offer a supportive and rewarding career experience. Here’s what you can expect from this opportunity:
Work from home
Monday to Friday 7AM to 4PM PHT (adjustments will be made for daylight saving time)
HMO with 1 free dependent and medical reimbursements
Government-mandated benefits
WFH allowances
Opportunities to work with leading companies in Australia and beyond
Training programmes for career development
Engaging company outings, team activities and wellness sessions
Supportive, inclusive culture
Dedicated managers focused on your growth and success
Twoconnect connects highly skilled Filipino professionals with established companies in Australia, New Zealand, the United States, the United Kingdom and Europe, providing direct access to global careers and long-term opportunities.
We offer competitive pay and benefits, additional entitlements and structured career development programs that make employment both financially rewarding and professionally sustainable. 
Our industry-leading retention rate demonstrates our commitment to a people-first culture that prioritizes stability, growth and genuine care for every employee.
Twoconnect is an equal opportunity employer. We value cultural diversity and foster an inclusive workplace where every employee is respected and supported as part of a growing global team.
🔗 Learn more about us through our official pages:
Website: https://twoconnect.com.au/
Careers: https://apply.workable.com/twoconnect-careers/ 
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/twoconnectau 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/2woconnect/ 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/twoconnect_/

title: Head of OPM
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of OPM in Colombia.
This leadership role offers the opportunity to act as the strategic and operational driver for a high-impact blockchain network, overseeing growth, performance, and ecosystem development. You will operate as the CEO of the network, influencing product, business development, partnerships, and marketing to transform it into a leading platform for DeFi, stablecoins, and next-generation on-chain applications. The role combines P&L ownership, strategic vision, and cross-functional influence, requiring a balance of data-driven decision making, stakeholder management, and hands-on execution. You will define key metrics, scale ecosystem initiatives, and ensure the network serves as both a proving ground and a neutral launchpad for enterprises. Success in this position demands strong analytical, technical, and strategic skills, along with credibility in the crypto ecosystem and the ability to navigate a fast-moving, highly collaborative environment.
\n

Accountabilities:
Define and execute the long-term vision, north-star metrics, and strategic positioning of the blockchain network.
Own overall P&L and growth trajectory, balancing performance, stability, and ecosystem alignment.
Lead quarterly planning and cross-functional alignment across Product, BD, Marketing, and Partnerships.
Drive ecosystem expansion, securing top-tier protocol integrations and partnerships to increase TVL, user adoption, and activity.
Collaborate with Product and Engineering teams to prioritize network-specific roadmap features, upgrades, and technical feedback loops.
Partner with Marketing to craft the network’s narrative, oversee launch readiness, and act as a public-facing spokesperson where appropriate.
Establish clear reporting structures for metrics, governance, and stakeholder communication.
Requirements:
6–10+ years of experience in crypto-native or blockchain ecosystems, including DeFi, L1/L2, or protocol leadership.
Proven track record as a strategic generalist capable of driving both technical and growth initiatives.
Experience building and scaling ecosystems from inception to maturity, with data-driven decision-making expertise.
Strong cross-functional collaboration skills, able to influence teams and stakeholders without direct authority.
Credible voice with developers, partners, and governance participants, capable of representing the network publicly.
Analytical, operational, and strategic thinker with experience in P&L management and ecosystem growth initiatives.
Exceptional communication and leadership skills to manage complex projects and align multiple orgs.
Benefits:
Competitive compensation package with fully paid medical, dental, and vision coverage.
401K plan with 4% employer match.
Fully remote work with flexibility to operate from anywhere.
Inclusive, diverse, and collaborative work environment with global teammates.
Opportunities for professional growth and impact within a leading blockchain network.
Supportive culture focused on long-term development and meaningful contributions.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether? 

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

Strong analytical, operational, and communication skills are essential for managing complex projects and aligning multiple organizations.

Remote professionals no longer waste hours applying blindly; instead, they receive a personalized job search strategy, stronger visibility, and curated matches aligned with their skills, flexibility preferences, and career goals.

We flip the hiring model by connecting talent only to roles that truly match, reducing noise for employers and eliminating wasted effort for candidates. title: International Payroll Specialist
description_text:
Contentsquare is the all-in-one experience intelligence platform designed to be easily used by anyone who cares about digital journeys. With our flexible and scalable platform, organizations quickly get a deep understanding of their customers’ whole online journey.

We are a global leader in the experience analytics space, with a growing presence across 15 offices worldwide. We’re here to stay—and we’re looking for team members who are excited to drive impact and help us scale even further.

Our aim is to create an inclusive workplace where everyone learns and succeeds. Contentsquare has built a community of individuals who are daring, understanding, and deliberate. We invite you to join us in making the complex simpler—for our customers, their customers, and each other.

Important note: Be careful of scammers pretending to be from Contentsquare. We will never ask for money or contact you through random texts. For more information, visit our careers blog.

About the job
Reporting to the Senior Payroll Manager based in Paris, you will play a crucial role in supporting our international payroll operations. In this dynamic and evolving role, you will have the opportunity to manage and become an expert in payroll processes across multiple countries, ensuring accuracy and compliance while maintaining an employee-centric approach. You will also contribute to ongoing projects such as opening new entities, automation, and improving payroll processes and efficiencies.

What you’ll do
Transmit variable information to payroll providers for the preparation of payslips.
Control payslips and review payroll reports to ensure correctness before transactions.
Manage salary advances and calculate variable payroll inputs, including transportation, meal vouchers, and on-call calculations.
Coordinate with People Operations on payroll changes, including employee leavers, new hires, and role changes; update data with salary or wage adjustments.
Process financial compensations or deductions such as bonuses and severance pay.
Prepare simulations for indemnities related to terminations and dismissals for the HR department.
Collect, enter, and upload payroll data; prepare and extract payroll reports; manage related tasks.
Provide support to team members and employees, addressing queries as needed.
Ensure compliance with relevant laws and internal policies.
Undertake ad-hoc tasks and provide coverage for absences to ensure continuous workflow.

What you’ll need to succeed
Experience in a similar or equivalent position within HR and/or Payroll, demonstrating familiarity with payroll or finance processes.
Exceptional time management, analytical, and investigative skills, enabling you to handle competing timelines and priorities with accuracy and efficiency while upholding high standards.
Proficiency in Excel (preferred) or Google Sheets, including advanced functions and calculation abilities.
Comfortable with relevant tools such as ADP Celergo, Papaya Payroll, Atlas or similar.
Strong critical thinking skills.
Ability to work effectively as part of a team, fostering support and growth among team members
Fluent in written and spoken English; proficiency in additional languages such as French, Spanish, Italian, or German is advantageous.

Nice-to-have
Experience working in the Tech / SAAS sector is beneficial but not essential.
Experience working on Workday Financials and/ or HCM
\n

\n
Why you should join Contentsquare
We invest in our people through career development, mentorship, social events, philanthropic activities, and competitive benefits. We are always assessing the perks we offer to ensure we’re aligned with the employees' needs.

Here are a few we want to highlight:
- Virtual onboarding, Hackathon, and various opportunities to interact with your team and global colleagues both on and offsite each year
- Work flexibility: hybrid and remote work policies
- Generous paid time-off policy (every location is different)
- Lifestyle allowance
- A Culture Crew in every country we’re based in to coordinate regular activities for employees to get to know each other and bond outside of work
- Every full-time employee receives stock options, allowing them to share in the company’s success
- We have multiple Employee Resource Groups, that offer a safe space for individuals who share common identities, life experiences, or allyship to connect, support one another, and passionately advocate for the issues close to their hearts
- And more benefits tailored to each country

Contentsquare is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to sex, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, race, color, religion, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, age, or any other characteristic protected by law.

Your personal data is used by Contentsquare for recruitment purposes only. Read our Job Candidate Privacy Notice to find out more about data protection at Contentsquare and your rights. You can exercise your rights by using our dedicated Data Subject Rights Portal here. 

Your personal data will be securely stored in our hosting provider’s data center in Oregon (US west). We have implemented appropriate transfer mechanisms under applicable data protection laws.

Contentsquare may use AI-assisted tools to help review and screen applications. All decisions involving hiring are made by human reviewers, and your personal data will be processed in accordance with our Candidate Privacy Policy.
ai_core_responsibilities: The International Payroll Specialist will manage payroll processes across multiple countries, ensuring accuracy and compliance. They will also support ongoing projects related to payroll improvements and entity openings.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have experience in HR and/or Payroll, with strong analytical and time management skills. Proficiency in Excel and familiarity with payroll tools are also required.

﻿
Our AI-powered insights provide those “ah ha” moments you need to deliver the right digital experiences. You get to work faster and smarter, with the confidence to know what to do next to improve.

﻿Leading brands use Contentsquare to grow their business, deliver more customer delight, and move with greater efficiency in a constantly changing world. Our insights optimize the experience on over 1.3 million websites worldwide.

title: People Operations Associate
description_text:
Job Title: HR Generalist
Type: Full-time
Experience: 2-3 years of experience
Location: Madrid

What about us?

Launched in 2023, INFINIT is a fast-growing fintech scale-up operating in multiple countries across Europe and Americas.

At INFINIT we are on a mission to reshape the future of SMEs. Our all-in-one operating system has banking at its core, and empowers small business owners and their teams to seamlessly manage and optimize every aspect of their business. By focussing on specific industries, INFINIT delivers tailored, high-value solutions, while building innovative AI products to further unlock significant growth opportunities for our customers. INFINIT operates globally, with ambitions to further expand its footprint to redefine the fintech landscape for SMEs worldwide.

Join us on the INFINIT journey as we revolutionise the SME economy and drive meaningful impact through innovation 🚀

The Role

As a HR Generalist at INFINIT reporting to the People & TA Lead, you will focus on the core HR functions that support the full employee lifecycle with a strong emphasis on employee relations, performance management, compliance, and day-to-day HR and People operations. You’ll help ensure our people processes run smoothly and contribute to a healthy, productive work environment.
\n

What do we want to achieve together?
Act as the first point of contact for employee questions, feedback, and concerns
Support initiatives to enhance employee experience, satisfaction, and engagement
Help implement and maintain company culture and values through HR practices
Recruitment
Support the People & TA Lead on recruitment efforts across ES, FR & UK
Working on strategic workforce planning efforts with the TA Lead to ensure an efficient talent acquisition strategy is in place
Onboarding & Off-boarding (Non-Recruiting)
Coordinate onboarding logistics including paperwork, systems access, and first-week orientation
Facilitate off-boarding processes including exit interviews and system deactivations
HR Operations & Compliance
Maintain and update employee records and HR documentation
Ensure compliance with labor laws and internal policies
Assist with benefits administration, leaves of absence, and policy interpretation
Support audits and reporting for internal and external stakeholders
People Operations Support
Ensure HRIS accuracy and contribute to process improvements such as workflow automations in order to improve operational efficiency
Support company-wide communications and policy updates
Assist with employee recognition programs and internal events

What do you need to be successful in this role?
2–3 years of experience in an HR Generalist or HR Coordinator role
In-house or agency recruitment experience 
Experience in a Tech or fast-paced environment is preferred
Solid understanding of HR fundamentals, general process and employment law
Experience using HRIS platforms (e.g., HiBob)
Strong attention to detail and organisational skills
Excellent interpersonal and communication skills 
Fluency in English is a must
Ability to work independently and handle sensitive matters with discretion

What will you find working at INFINIT?
Competitive Salary and Equity: We offer highly competitive salaries and a stake in our success with share options because we're building this together.
Diverse and Inclusive Team: Join a dynamic and international team in excess of 8 nationalities. You'll have the chance to work with experienced professionals from around the world, fostering a rich learning environment.
Inspiring Mission: We are dedicated to revolutionizing business financing and making a positive impact on the European economy. Your work at INFINIT will have a lasting effect on businesses and communities.
Flexible Benefits: Access Flexible Retribution benefits through a convenient mobile app
Health and Well-being: Your health matters to us. You will have access to top-quality Medical & Mental Health Insurance.
Quality Time Together: We foster a sense of community with annual gatherings and bi-weekly office team gatherings. You're more than welcome to join us for quality time.
Personal Time Off: Enjoy flexibility with your personal time off.
Flexibility and Ownership: We trust our team and we are goal-oriented. Enjoy the flexibility of hybrid working 3 days a week in our Madrid hub and 2 at home

\n
Diversity & Inclusion

INFINIT promotes an inclusive culture that seeks equity and values different perspectives. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and consider all qualified applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status or any other legally protected characteristic.
ai_core_responsibilities: As a HR Generalist, you will support the full employee lifecycle with a focus on employee relations, performance management, and compliance. You will also coordinate onboarding logistics and maintain employee records.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 2-3 years of experience in an HR Generalist or HR Coordinator role, preferably in a tech or fast-paced environment. A solid understanding of HR fundamentals and experience using HRIS platforms is also required.

title: Business Planning and Development Manager
description_text:
About the company:

Ninja Van is a tech-enabled logistics company on a mission to provide hassle-free delivery services for businesses of all sizes across Southeast Asia. Launched in 2014, we started operations in Singapore and have become the region's largest and fastest growing last-mile logistics company, partnering with over 35,000 merchants and delivering more than 1,000 parcels every minute across six countries. In January 2018, we raised one of the largest Series C rounds ever in Southeast Asia and are well-positioned for our next phase of rapid growth.
At our core, we are a technology company that is disrupting a massive industry with cutting-edge software and operational concepts. Powered by algorithm-based optimisation, dynamic routing, end-to-end tracking and a data-driven approach, we prAbovide best-of-class delivery services that delight both the shippers and end customers. But we are just getting started! We have much room for improvement and many ideas that will further shape the industry.

About the unit:
The Business Development & Planning Unit plans and executes high priority projects, solves cross-functional problems, and provides multiple cross-industry and collaborative initiatives for value-generating engagements.The Unit enables the rhythm of business to individual performance and orient the growth of the organization towards a shared direction, whilst honing effectiveness in communications, operational excellence, knowledge management and process improvement.

Job Description
The Business Planning and Development Manager will be tasked to oversee the planning and execution of high priority projects and solve cross-functional problems. The Manager shall be required to have in-depth exposure to the Company’s functions and to work closely with various Unit Heads and stakeholders in order to achieve its target outputs that shall have a direct impact on the overall or inter-departmental operations of the business. 

Business Planning
The role will also play a key role in supporting the leadership team of Ninja Van Philippines in enabling the rhythm of business to individual performance, specifically to Ninja Van Philippines. The role will be responsible for orienting the growth of the organization towards a shared direction, whilst honing effectiveness in communications, operational excellence, knowledge management and process improvement.
The position will sit within the Business Operations unit and will possess a strong grasp of the country’s strategy and goals, be familiar with the responsibilities of our business functions, partner closely with the Regional and Country stakeholders to align their Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) and advocate the use of data to drive objective performance conversations at every level of Ninja Van PH. 
The team delivers against two functional pillars, namely
1. Core Operations (Data management for our KPIs/business metrics, program implementation and governance)
2. Knowledge Management & Optimisation (Strengthen our internal policies and build advocacy through education and engagement).
Key activities include partnering with the Regional, Country management team, and Planning teams to manage the annual corporate strategic planning process across Ninja Van PH, leading the development of KPIs, engaging country management stakeholders through education and engagement, and general management of progress and timelines of key initiatives across the Ninja Van PH.

Business Development 
The Manager will also be responsible in developing mutually beneficial relationships and partnerships that are aligned to the country’s strategy and goals. He researches market opportunities, analyzes market strategies, and helps in building the market position of Ninja Van in the industry. He shall be able to drive multiple cross-industry and collaborative initiatives to offer value-generating engagements. 


\n

Minimum Qualifications
Graduate of business management, social sciences, economics, statistics, or other high quantitative/analytic courses
3-5 years of strong relevant experience in operations, business, and quantitatives 
Specialization in relevant field (operations research, programming, data analytics, business planning, strategy, marketing, etc.) is a plus
Proven project management experience
Can work and communicate effectively with various profiles from different stakeholder groups
High analytical ability - critical and logical thinking and optimization


\n
ai_core_responsibilities: The Business Planning and Development Manager will oversee the planning and execution of high priority projects and solve cross-functional problems. They will work closely with various Unit Heads and stakeholders to achieve target outputs impacting overall operations.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a graduate degree in business management or related fields and 3-5 years of relevant experience in operations and business. Proven project management experience and strong analytical abilities are essential.

title: Web Designer
description_text:
Company Overview
At LevelUp, we believe growth happens when people feel trusted, supported, and challenged. For more than seven years we’ve partnered with agencies, software vendors and website owners to provide world class outsourcing and offshore hiring services in a range of verticals, such as technical, operational, and back-office support. We hire curious problem-solvers, give them room to own outcomes, and back them with systems, support and a culture that makes learning part of the job. Join us and help businesses (and your career) level up.

Position Overview
As a Web Designer, you will be the bridge between creative vision and technical execution. You will be responsible for designing websites from scratch and bringing those designs to life using Elementor on WordPress. This role demands a sharp eye for detail and a deep understanding of core design principles, including layout, typography, and color theory, to ensure every project is both beautiful and functional.
\n

Key Responsibilities
End-to-End Design: Design and create aesthetically pleasing, user-friendly websites from scratch, ensuring an intuitive user experience.
WordPress Implementation: Use Elementor to implement designs on WordPress, customizing themes and templates to meet client specifications.
Layout Management: Develop and maintain website layouts, ensuring consistency and responsiveness across devices.
Prototyping: Create high-quality mock-ups, prototypes, and wireframes.
Component Customization: Customize website components such as menus, forms, and buttons to enhance interactivity and functionality.
Performance & SEO: Optimize websites for speed, performance, and SEO best practices.
Quality Assurance: Conduct cross-browser testing and resolve any compatibility issues.
Collaboration: Collaborate with clients and team members to understand design requirements and work closely with the development team to ensure seamless integration of design and functionality.
Technical Maintenance: Troubleshoot design and technical issues when needed.
Continuous Learning: Stay current with design trends, tools, and technologies and implement best practices in design and web development.

Qualifications 
Proven Experience: Demonstrated experience in web design, specifically creating websites from scratch and using Elementor for implementation.
Portfolio: A portfolio showcasing your design and web development skills, with a focus on websites built using Elementor.
Technical Proficiency: Proficiency with Elementor, WordPress, and design tools such as Photoshop, Sketch, or Figma.
Coding Skills: Strong understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Design Sensibility: A good eye for detail, colour combinations, and layout principles.
Responsive Design: Experience designing responsive websites that work across various devices and screen sizes.
Optimization Knowledge: Knowledge of SEO best practices and website performance optimization.
Professional Skills: Strong problem-solving skills, ability to troubleshoot technical issues, and the capacity to work under tight deadlines while managing multiple projects simultaneously.
Communication: Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written, with the ability to present ideas and collaborate effectively with clients and colleagues.

What We Offer
The opportunity to work with a dynamic digital agency on a diverse portfolio of client projects.
A collaborative environment where your creative and technical expertise directly impacts the growth of the agency.
Fully remote work arrangement
Benefits: HMO + 13th month pay
Work Schedule: Monday-Friday, 4pm-1am

\n
₱40,000 - ₱50,000 a month
\n
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Web Designer, you will design and create aesthetically pleasing, user-friendly websites from scratch, ensuring an intuitive user experience. You will also implement designs on WordPress using Elementor and collaborate with clients and team members to meet design requirements.
ai_requirements_summary: The ideal candidate should have proven experience in web design, specifically using Elementor, and a strong portfolio showcasing relevant skills. Technical proficiency in design tools and coding languages, along with excellent communication skills, is also required.

title: Network Engineer (AWS) - 24*7 role
description_text:
Keyloop bridges the gap between dealers, manufacturers, technology suppliers and car buyers.
We empower car dealers and manufacturers to fully embrace digital transformation. How? By creating innovative technology that makes selling cars better for our customers, and buying and owning cars better for theirs.
We use cutting-edge technology to link our clients’ systems, departments and sites. We provide an open technology platform that’s shaping the industry for the future. We use data to help clients become more efficient, increase profitability and give more customers an amazing experience. Want to be part of it?


Role Overview:

We are seeking an experienced and proactive Infrastructure Network Engineer (L2/L3) to join our 24/7 Operations Center, working from the office.
This senior role involves leading complex technical projects, providing advanced (second and third-line) network support, and maintaining Keyloop’s global network infrastructure. The successful candidate will have strong hands-on experience across Cisco, Meraki, wireless, routing, and security technologies, with a deep understanding of cloud and datacentre networking, including AWS networking principles.
The role will work closely with the 24/7 Operations Centre to ensure smooth network operations and may occasionally require working outside regular hours during critical activities or resource outages.
\n

Deliver complex technical projects and network implementations.
Provide second and third-line technical support for network issues and escalations.
Demonstrate deep expertise across Cisco, Meraki, wireless, routing, and security solutions.
Maintain and upgrade network infrastructure across datacentres and offices to enhance resilience.
Maximize network performance by monitoring, troubleshooting problems, and addressing outages.
Collaborate with network architects on optimization strategies and schedule planned upgrades.
Secure network systems and firewall environments by defining and enforcing policies.
Ensure all incidents and problems are managed within agreed SLAs.
Mentor and support junior engineers, fostering a culture of knowledge sharing and continuous improvement.


Essential skillsets:
Strong practical knowledge of Cisco solutions and technologies including Wireless, ASA, switches, routers, and ACS.
Cisco CCNA certification (CCNP or higher preferred) or equivalent professional experience.
Advanced understanding of BGP/MPLS, DMVPN, and IPSEC.
Proven experience in securing and optimizing enterprise-scale network environments.
Hands-on experience with network monitoring tools such as SolarWinds and NetFlow.
Excellent analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills.
Strong communication skills (both written and verbal).
Customer-focused mindset and ability to prioritize effectively in a high-demand environment.
Exposure to ITIL methodology and service-oriented operational processes.

Desirable:
Working knowledge of:
o VMware SDWAN
o Cisco IPSEC VPN and FlexVPN
o Zscaler
o BIG-IP F5
o DNS
o FortiGate Firewalls
o Cisco ISE
o RSA Security Console
o AWS Networking Principles
o GitHub for configuration and automation management
Experience in a global Infrastructure Operations environment.
Ability to lead technical escalations and coordinate across cross-functional teams and previous experience working in a 24/7 Infrastructure Operations environment.

Additional Information:
This position is work from office, requiring presence during all shifts, including nights and weekends as part of the 24/7 Operations Center and office cab transport is provided for all shifts.

\n
Why join us?
We’re on a journey to become market leaders in our space – and with that comes some incredible opportunities. Collaborate and learn from industry experts from all over the globe. Work with game-changing products and services. Get the training and support you need to try new things, adapt to quick changes and explore different paths. Join Keyloop and progress your career, your way.
An inclusive environment to thrive
We’re committed to fostering an inclusive work environment. One that respects all dimensions of diversity. We promote an inclusive culture within our business, and we celebrate different employees and lifestyles – not just on key days, but every day.
Be rewarded for your efforts
We believe people should be paid based on their performance so our pay and benefits reflect this and are designed to attract the very best talent. We encourage everyone in our organisation to explore opportunities which enable them to grow their career through investment in their development but equally by working in a culture which fosters support and unbridled collaboration.

Keyloop doesn’t require academic qualifications for this position. We select based on experience and potential, not credentials.
We are also an equal opportunity employer committed to building a diverse and inclusive workforce. We value diversity and encourage candidates of all backgrounds to apply.
ai_core_responsibilities: Deliver complex technical projects and provide advanced network support. Maintain and upgrade network infrastructure while ensuring smooth operations in a 24/7 environment.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have strong hands-on experience with Cisco and AWS networking principles. A Cisco CCNA certification or equivalent experience is preferred, along with advanced knowledge of network security and optimization.

title: Senior Software Engineer (Node.js/React)
description_text:
The company and our mission: 

Zartis is a digital solutions provider working across technology strategy, software engineering, and product development.

We partner with firms across financial services, MedTech, media, logistics technology, renewable energy, EdTech, e-commerce, and more. Our engineering hubs in EMEA and LATAM are full of talented professionals delivering business success and digital improvement across application development, software architecture, CI/CD, business intelligence, QA automation, and new technology integrations.

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to work on a project in the digital mental health sector.

The project:

Our teammates are talented people that come from a variety of backgrounds. We’re committed to building an inclusive culture based on trust and innovation.

You will be part of a distributed team revolutionising digital mental health care, creating the UK’s largest platform that supports and empowers young people with their mental health. As a Senior Software Engineer, you will help set the technical direction and build reliable, scalable systems that guide young people to the right help.


What you will do:

- Design, build, and operate a suite of Node.js backend services, React-based web apps, React Native mobile and web experiences that form the backbone of their platform.
- Take end-to-end ownership of features, from idea through to production, with a strong sense of accountability and user impact.
- Ensure the impact of a legacy platform through proactive maintenance, strategic incremental enhancements and high-quality technical support.
- Contribute to system design and architectural evolution.
- Lead by example in trunk-based development, automated testing, CI/CD, and infrastructure-as-code principles.
- Take ownership of performance, resilience, observability, maintainability, security, and accessibility.
- Actively collaborate across disciplines and mentor colleagues through pairing, code reviews, and knowledge-sharing.
- Drive a shared understanding of user needs, commercial priorities, and how technical decisions influence business outcomes.
- Participate in the out-of-hours on-call rota and improving system reliability and incident response processes.
- Continuously improve the systems you work on, applying a thoughtful and pragmatic approach to technical challenges.
- Stay current with industry best practices in engineering, CI/CD, and architecture.


What you will bring:

- At least 3+ years of hands-on experience in full-stack software development in a product-oriented environment.
- Proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and either React or React Native, as well as database technologies such as PostgreSQL and experience in delivering a web or native mobile application.
- Solid understanding of modern system architecture and the ability to contribute to its evolution.
- Commitment to quality, with experience shipping maintainable, scalable, and well-tested code.
- Ownership mentality with a focus on pragmatic delivery and continuous improvement.
- Skilled in agile practices, data-informed decision-making, and building reliability.
- Excellent communication and collaboration skills, including mentoring and inspiring peers, and building great relationships across disciplines.


Nice to have:

- Deep experience with React and React Native in production environments.
- Experience operating production systems and improving them through observability, testing, and thoughtful design.
- A track record of delivering product improvements that tie into measurable business and user outcomes.
- Familiarity with cross-platform design, mobile/web accessibility, and monorepos.
- Expertise in trunk-based development, test automation and infrastructure as code.
- Experience with scalable system design and architecture patterns.
- Exposure to cloud-native technologies, particularly GCP or AWS with Kubernetes.


What we offer: 

- 100% Remote Work.
- WFH allowance: Monthly payment as financial support for remote working.
- Training: For Tech training at Zartis, you have time allocated during the week at your disposal. You can request from a variety of options, such as online courses (from Pluralsight and Educative.io, for example), English classes, books, conferences, and events.
- Mentoring Program: You can become a mentor in Zartis, receive mentorship, or both.
- Career Growth: We have established a career development program accessible for all employees with a 360º feedback that will help us to guide you in your career progression.
- Zartis Wellbeing Hub (Kara Connect): A platform that provides sessions with a range of specialists, including mental health professionals, nutritionists, physiotherapists, fitness coaches, and webinars with such professionals as well.
- Flexible Working schedule. 
- Multicultural working environment: We organize tech events, webinars, parties, and activities to do online team-building games and contests.
\n

\n
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Senior Software Engineer, you will design, build, and operate backend services and web applications while taking end-to-end ownership of features. You will also contribute to system design and lead by example in best practices.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have at least 3+ years of experience in full-stack software development with proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and React or React Native. A commitment to quality and experience in agile practices are also essential.

WHO WE ARE:

Zartis is a digital solutions provider and Deloitte Fast50 company specialising in technology consulting, team augmentation, and product development.

We partner with businesses to deliver high-quality software solutions, combining technical expertise with a deep understanding of industry challenges. Our team includes engineers from over 30 nationalities, providing global expertise and high-quality engineering to help our clients innovate, scale, and build future-ready digital solutions.

WHAT WE DO:

Zartis specialises in delivering technology solutions for CleanTech, MedTech, FinTech, and RegTech, among other industries. With engineers across EMEA and LATAM, we help businesses drive digital transformation through application development, software architecture, DevOps and CI/CD, business intelligence, QA automation, technology integrations, legacy system modernisation, and cloud optimisation. Our industry expertise allows us to address sector-specific challenges while delivering scalable and effective solutions.

OUR EXPERTISE:

Our engineers have extensive experience in frontend and backend development with JavaScript, TypeScript, .NET, Java, Python, Scala, Ruby, and Go. We work across all major cloud platforms including AWS, Azure and operate as an official Microsoft Solutions Partner in Digital & App Innovation, Data & AI, and Infrastructure. Security and compliance are central to our development process, following ISO 27001 best practices and a secure software development lifecycle.

Whether you need guidance on optimising your technology stack or additional engineering support, Zartis adapts to your needs to help you build, scale, and future-proof your digital capabilities.

title: Commercial Immobilienberater/in (m/w/d) – Vollzeit in Festanstellung für unseren Standort in Göttingen
description_text:
Engel & Völkers ist ein international tätiges Beratungs- und Vermittlungsunternehmen für Immobilien. Seit 1977 am Markt tätig, mit über 16.000 Mitarbeitenden weltweit und von drei Kernwerten geprägt: Kompetenz, Exklusivität und Leidenschaft.

Engel & Völkers ist auf die Anforderungen von Gewerbeimmobilien spezialisiert. Deutschlandweit blicken wir auf eine über 40-jährige Erfolgsgeschichte zurück. Durch die konsequente Ausrichtung unserer Dienstleistung auf die einzelnen Assetklassen verfügen wir über eine einzigartige Marktkompetenz. Für Göttingen & Kassel suchen wir zum nächstmöglichen Zeitpunkt Immobilienberatende mit dem Schwerpunkt Akquise und Vermarktung von Gewerbeimmobilien.
\n

Ihre Aufgaben
Kundenservice: Begleitung der Kundschaft vom Erstkontakt bis zum Geschäftsabschluss, Durchführung von Beratungsterminen und Besichtigungen
Immobilienanalyse: Analysieren Sie Immobilien hinsichtlich Lage, Größe und technischer Ausstattung, Anwendung fundierter Kenntnisse der Assetklassen
Aufbereitung von Unterlagen: Erstellung und Aufbereitung von Objektunterlagen, Verfassen umfangreicher Exposés, Erstellung von Reportings über durchgeführte Aktivitäten
Bearbeitung von Kauf- und Mietsuchen: Erfassung des Bedarfs der Suchkundschaft, Herstellung einer reibungslosen Vermittlung
Kommunikation und Akquise: Zielstrebige Kommunikation mit Menschen, Erwerb neuer Geschäftskundschaft, Betreuung bestehender Geschäftskundschaft

Ihr Profil
Ausbildung und Qualifikation: Abgeschlossene Lehre oder abgeschlossenes Studium, ein Netzwerk in der regionalen Immobilienbranche ist von Vorteilen
Kommunikationsstärke: Sicher im persönlichen Gespräch, Kompetent im schriftlichen Austausch
Dienstleistungsmentalität: Verhandlungssicher im Einsatz für die Kundschaft, Durchsetzungsstark in Diskussionen
Interesse und Affinität: Hohe Affinität für Immobilien und Vertrieb
Engagement und Motivation: Engagiert und motiviert, sich stetig weiterzuentwickeln, Fähigkeit, selbstständig zu arbeiten, schnelle Auffassungsgabe für neues Wissen
Unternehmerisches Denken und Zielstrebigkeit: Unternehmerisches Denken und Handeln als Stärke, Klare Zielsetzung und konsequente Zielverfolgung

\n
Wir bieten Ihnen die Möglichkeit, Ihre Karriere in einer stark wachsenden Branche aufzubauen und Teil unseres ambitionierten Teams zu werden. Darüber hinaus nehmen wir unsere Verantwortung als arbeitsgebende Person ernst und wollen, dass Sie sich in unserem Unternehmen wohlfühlen. Deine abwechslungsreichen Tätigkeiten kannst du in angenehmer Arbeitsatmosphäre, unter modernen Bedingungen und mit einer flexiblen Gestaltung deines Arbeitstages ausführen. Ihr Arbeitsplatz befindet sich in einem modernen Büro in Göttinger City. Sie können unsere Firmenfahrzeuge für Ihre Termine nutzen und Corporate Benefits (Mitarbeiterangebote) erhalten. Zur Einarbeitung steht Ihr Team fest an Ihrer Seite und fördert Ihre Entwicklung. Wir zahlen nicht nur ein festes Gehalt, Top-Leistungen belohnen wir mit einer Extra-Provision. Mit Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten wie z.B. in unserem hauseigenen Engel & Völkers Akademie können Sie bei uns schnell vorankommen. Werden Sie Teil unseres Teams und bewerben Sie sich jetzt!

title: Operational Risk Manager
description_text:
Our Story
Hello there. We’re Zopa.
We started our journey back in 2005, building the first ever peer-to-peer lending company. Fast forward to 2020 and we launched Zopa Bank. A bank that listens to what our customers don’t like about finance and does the opposite. We’re redefining what it feels like to work in finance. Our vision for a new era of banking puts people front and centre — we’ve built a business that empowers everyone to aim high, every day, to move finance forward. Find out more about our fantastic offerings at Zopa.com! 

We’re incredibly proud of our achievements and none of it would be possible without the amazing team here. It’s not just industry awards we’re winning, we’ve also been named in the top three UK’s Most Loved Workplaces. 

If you embrace unconventional challenges, are unafraid to think differently and are driven to make an outsized impact, you’ll thrive here at Zopa, so join us, and make it count. Want to see us in action? Follow us on Instagram @zopalife 

At Zopa, we believe risk management is our competitive advantage. We want it to be a cutting-edge, data-led capability that fundamentally improves how we build and run our products, not just making us safer but also faster and more efficient. 

Reporting to the Director of Operational Risk, you’ll be part of a small, high-impact 2nd line team working closely with Operations, Product, Customer Services, and other business areas. Your job: to understand how our processes really work, identify where they can fail, and use evidence, logic, analytical tools and AI, and sound judgement to challenge and strengthen how Zopa manages risk. 

This is a role for someone who thinks like an engineer, curious, precise, and rigorous and applies that mindset to operational processes. You’ll use data, AI and analysis to assess how well controls operate in practice and guide first line teams on what “good” truly looks like. 
\n

A day in the life:
Analyse how processes and controls really work – map end-to-end workflows, trace data and hand-offs, and identify where things can break or be simplified. 
Run targeted risk reviews – dig deep into operational areas such as payments, customer operations, supplier management, or collections to evidence whether controls are working effectively. 
Assess and challenge first line controls – use critical thinking and an engineering mindset to judge whether controls are well-designed, efficient, and proportionate. 
Guide on what “good” looks like – share insight and best practice with first line teams to strengthen controls, making them more targeted, automated, efficient and effective, using the best analytical and technical tooling. 
Deliver clear, evidence-based assurance – produce concise findings that highlight key issues, root causes, and practical fixes. 

About you:
Engineering mindset – think in systems, spot failure points, and use logic and evidence to test whether controls really work. 
Analytical and curious – enjoy understanding how operational processes fit together and where they might fail. 
Critical thinker – comfortable forming independent, well-reasoned judgements and explaining them clearly. 
Process literate – skilled at mapping workflows, controls, and dependencies to see the whole picture. 
Commercially aware – able to balance risk management discipline with practical business delivery. 
Pragmatic and outcome-driven – care about reducing real risk, not generating paperwork. 
Analytical and evidence-led – base your conclusions on analysis, data, and facts. 
Collaborative and thoughtful – partner well with first line teams to improve, not just critique. 
AI advocate – well-versed and hands-on in using AI to solve problems, forward-thinking about what it can do and how to put it to use effectively. 
Eager to learn – keen to build deep expertise and grow into more complex risk domains. 
Process-curious – fascinated by how things actually work and how to make them safer and stronger. 

\n
#LI-LK1

At Zopa we value flexible ways of working. 
We value face-to-face collaboration and a good work-life balance. This hybrid role requires you to come to our London office 2-3 days a week.
You'll also have the option of working from abroad for up to 120 days a year!* But no matter where you are, we’ll make sure you’ve got everything you need to thrive, both in your work and home life, from day one.

*Subject to having the right to work in the country of choice

Diversity Statement
Zopa is proud to offer a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and backgrounds leads to better products for our customers and a unique company culture for our people. We are made up of nearly 50 nationalities, have a DE&I forum made up of Zopians wanting to make a difference and we are proud of our culture where everyone can bring their full self to work. Our approach to DE&I is reflected in our hiring process so please let us know if you require any reasonable adjustments.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Operational Risk Manager will analyze processes and controls, run targeted risk reviews, and assess first line controls to ensure they are effective. They will guide teams on best practices and deliver clear, evidence-based assurance.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should possess an engineering mindset, be analytical and curious, and have strong critical thinking skills. They should also be process literate and commercially aware, with a focus on reducing real risk and improving operational processes.

linkedin_org_description:
We’re Zopa, and we want to make money work better for you.

Our diverse team is united in their mission of creating simple, fair and honest financial products that have the customer’s needs at their heart. We’re proud that this dedication is reflected in our excellent rating on TrustPilot.

We’ve always been unapologetically honest with our customers, and value the same in return. Their feedback helps us shape what we build, so we can provide a bank fit for today, and for the future.

We’re not the new kids on the block though - we’ve been a pioneering force in finance for 16 years. In 2005, we built the first ever peer-to-peer (P2P) lending company, giving our customers access to loans built for real-life and intelligent investments backed by cutting-edge tech. In 2020, we launched Zopa Bank, meaning we could offer more – like fixed term savings backed by FSCS protection and a credit card to help customers take control of their finances.

We’ve lent out over £6 billion and are proud to have made money work better for over half a million people across the UK, whether they were looking to borrow or save.

title: Commercial Analytics Life Sciences consultant
description_text:
Role Overview
We are looking for a solution-oriented Life Sciences Analytics Consultant to strengthen Lingaro’s Commercial Analytics Practice. This role is ideal for someone who excels at end-to-end solutioning — from framing complex Life Sciences business problems and defining analytical approaches, to shaping scalable analytics products that can be deployed across brands, markets, and regions.
The role combines billable client delivery, pre-sales solutioning, and sales support, with a strong emphasis on reusable, industrialized solutions rather than one-off analyses.
Key Responsibilities
Own Solution Design & Architecture
Lead the solutioning of Life Sciences analytics use cases, including:
Commercial performance and launch analytics
Sales force effectiveness & field force productivity
HCP targeting, segmentation, and coverage models
Patient, prescription, and demand analytics
CRM, omnichannel, and engagement effectiveness use cases
Define end-to-end solution blueprints: data inputs, metrics, analytical logic, outputs, and business actions.
Deliver Billable Client Work
Actively contribute to billable client engagements, with clear ownership of solution design and analytical logic.
Ensure delivered solutions meet business objectives and are adopted by commercial teams.
Balance delivery execution with solutioning, pre-sales, and capability-building activities.
Translate Life Sciences Business Problems into Scalable Analytics
Work closely with client commercial, medical, and analytics stakeholders to frame business questions and success criteria.
Convert business needs into clear analytical requirements that can be industrialized.
Ensure solutions are actionable, compliant, repeatable, and scalable across markets.
Support Pre-Sales & Sales Processes
Play an active role in pre-sales and sales support, including:
Shaping solution approaches and architectures for client opportunities
Developing POVs, demos, and solution narratives
Supporting RFPs, proposals, and effort estimations
Partner closely with sales and account teams to translate client needs into compelling analytics solutions.
Contribute to client meetings by articulating how analytics drives measurable commercial impact.
Drive Industrialization & Reusability
Build and maintain reusable Life Sciences accelerators, KPI frameworks, and analytics templates.
Standardize metrics, logic, and solution patterns to enable faster go-to-market and consistent quality.
Partner with engineering and data science teams to ensure solutions are production-ready.
Partner with Delivery & Technology Teams
Act as solution owner during delivery, ensuring alignment between business intent and technical implementation.
Review analytical logic, dashboards, and outputs to guarantee business and scientific relevance.
Support testing, validation, and rollout of solutions.
Build Life Sciences Analytics Capability
Contribute to internal documentation, playbooks, and best practices.
Support internal initiatives (e.g. innovation, hackathons, thought leadership) where relevant to Life Sciences growth.
Required Experience & Skills
Domain & Solutioning Experience
5–7 years of experience in analytics consulting, Life Sciences analytics, or commercial excellence roles.
Strong experience designing Life Sciences analytics solutions such as:
Sales force effectiveness & incentive analytics
HCP segmentation and targeting
Launch and demand analytics
CRM and omnichannel effectiveness frameworks
Proven ability to move from business problem → analytics design → scalable solution.
Experience working with Life Sciences datasets such as sales, prescription, engagement (e.g. IQVIA, CRM, Veeva, etc.)
Analytics & Technology Foundation
Experience working with Life Sciences data (sales, prescription, CRM, engagement).
Comfortable defining KPI logic, data transformations, and analytical workflows.
Hands-on exposure to analytics and BI tools (SQL, Python, Power BI, Tableau, or similar).
Familiarity with data pipelines and analytics product concepts is a strong plus.
Consulting & Communication Skills
Strong solution storytelling and client-facing communication skills.
Ability to balance delivery, pre-sales, and internal contribution.
Structured, pragmatic, and impact-focused mindset.
Language
Fluent in English.
\n

\n
ai_core_responsibilities: The consultant will lead the solutioning of Life Sciences analytics use cases and actively contribute to billable client engagements. They will also support pre-sales and sales processes while ensuring solutions are scalable and actionable.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 5-7 years of experience in analytics consulting or Life Sciences analytics, with strong skills in designing analytics solutions. Familiarity with Life Sciences datasets and analytics tools is essential.
